terms: {'central bank': '中央銀行', 'monetary policy normalisation': '貨幣政策「正常化」'}
src_raw: US-China trade tensions remained a big wild card. Lingering uncertainties over trade talks between the world’s two largest economies rattled investor confidence and undermined international trade, manufacturing, investment and even consumption. Gone are the days when global economic expansion was a given. The global economy entered a synchronised slowdown during the year. In response to the slower growth, major central banks around the world have reversed course on their monetary policy normalisation.
mt_raw: 中美貿易緊張局勢仍然是揮之不去的變數。世界兩大經濟體之間的貿易談判持續不明朗，令投資者信心動搖，並對國際貿易、製造業、投資乃至消費造成不利影響。全球經濟擴張已不再是必然趨勢。當年全球經濟同步成長的景象已成往昔。為應對經濟成長趨緩，全球主要央行紛紛調整貨幣政策，由緊縮轉為寬鬆。
alg_terms: {'central bank': '央行', 'monetary policy normalisation': '貨幣政策'}
norm_tgt_terms: ['央行', '貨幣政策']

terms: {'unemployment rate': '失業率', 'novel coronavirus': '新型冠狀病毒', 'covid - 19': '新型冠狀病毒'}
src_raw: Locally, social incidents happening in the second half of the year dealt a further blow to the Hong Kong economy. The retail, tourism and catering sectors were among the hardest hit. For 2019 as a whole, the Hong Kong economy contracted by 1.2%, the first annual decline in a decade, while the unemployment rate rose to 3.3% from a multi-year low of 2.8% at the beginning of the year. As 2020 dawned, the novel coronavirus (COVID-19) outbreak posed yet another significant threat to both global and local economies.
mt_raw: 本地社會事件在下半年對香港經濟造成了進一步的打擊。零售、旅遊和餐飲業受到的影響尤為嚴重。 2019年全年，香港經濟萎縮1.2%，為十年來首次出現年度負增長，而失業率從年初的創多年來低點2.8%上升至3.3%。 隨著2020年的到來，新型冠狀病毒（COVID-19）疫情又對全球及本地經濟構成了另一項重大威脅。
alg_terms: {'unemployment rate': '失業率', 'novel coronavirus': '新型冠狀病毒', 'covid - 19': '19'}
norm_tgt_terms: ['失業率', '新型冠狀病毒', '19']

terms: {'chief executive of the hkma': '金管局總裁', 'hkma': '金管局'}
src_raw: In the face of such an uncertain and challenging environment, it is of paramount importance to maintain monetary and financial stability in Hong Kong, as I made clear when taking over as Chief Executive of the HKMA on 1 October 2019.
mt_raw: 面對如此不確定且充滿挑戰的環境，維持香港的貨幣及金融穩定至關重要，這一點我在2019年10月1日接任香港金融管理局總裁時已明確指出。

norm_tgt_terms: ['香港金融管理局總裁', '香港金融管理局']

terms: {'lers': '聯匯制度', 'linked exchange rate system': '聯繫匯率制度', 'banking system': '銀行體系', 'outflow of fund': '資金流出'}
src_raw: The Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS) in place since 1983 has helped Hong Kong weather numerous challenges and shocks, demonstrating its important role as an anchor of Hong Kong’s economic prosperity and status as an international financial centre. Notwithstanding the challenging external and domestic environment during the year, the LERS continued to operate in a smooth and orderly manner, once again proving its resilience in times of uncertainty. Hong Kong’s banking system also remained sound and robust. The facts speak for themselves: the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate remained stable and has strengthened to the strong side of the Convertibility Zone in recent months, while bank deposits continued to grow during the year. In a nutshell, no noticeable outflow of funds from the Hong Kong dollar or the banking system was observed.
mt_raw: 自1983年實施的聯繫匯率制度，有助於香港應對多項挑戰和衝擊，充分體現了其作為香港經濟繁榮基石及國際金融中心地位的重要作用。儘管外部及本地經濟環境充滿挑戰，聯繫匯率制度運作依然暢順且具秩序，再次證明其在不確定時期的韌性。香港銀行體系亦保持穩健。數據印證：港元匯率維持穩定，並在近月增強至可兌換區間強方，銀行存款亦持續增長。總而言之，並未見港元或銀行體系出現明顯資金外流情況。
src_terms: ['lers', 'linked exchange rate system', 'banking system', 'outflow of fund']
alg_terms: {'lers': '▔', 'linked exchange rate system': '聯繫匯率制度', 'banking system': '銀行體系', 'outflow of fund': '資金外流'}
norm_tgt_terms: ['▔', '聯繫匯率制度', '銀行體系', '資金外流']

terms: {'swift': '環球銀行金融電信協會(SWIFT)', 'banking system': '銀行體系'}
src_raw: The stability of Hong Kong’s monetary and banking systems reflects not only the robustness of, but also strong confidence in, our systems. This did not happen overnight, but through years of efforts to build up buffers and strengthen surveillance, complemented by our swift response to rumours on social media platforms.
mt_raw: 香港的貨幣和銀行體系的穩定性，不僅反映出我們體系的穩健，也反映出外界對我們體系的強烈信心。這並非一朝一夕之功，而是經過多年的努力，建立緩衝機制、加強監測，並配合我們對社交媒體平台上謠言的迅速回應，才得以實現的。
alg_terms: {'swift': '迅速', 'banking system': '銀行體系'}
norm_tgt_terms: ['迅速', '銀行體系']

terms: {'asset quality': '資產質素', 'banking system': '銀行體系', 'countercyclical macroprudential measure': '逆周期宏觀審慎措施', 'foreign exchange reserve': '外匯儲備', 'property market': '物業市場'}
src_raw: Our preparations over the years for rainy days have built a solid foundation and strong buffers for Hong Kong’s monetary and banking systems. In addition to the vast foreign exchange reserves in our public coffers, our banking system has strong capital buffers, robust liquidity and very good asset quality, whether by international or historical standards. The eight rounds of countercyclical macroprudential measures on property mortgages implemented since 2009 have also greatly enhanced banks’ resilience against a property market downturn.
mt_raw: 多年來我們為應對不測而做的準備，為香港的貨幣和銀行體系奠定了堅實基礎和強大緩衝。除了公共財政中龐大的外匯儲備，我們的銀行體系亦具備強健的資本緩衝、穩健的流動性及優良的資產質素，無論就國際或歷史標準而言均表現出色。自2009年起實施的八輪逆週期宏觀審慎措施，亦大大增強銀行對樓市下行的抗風險能力。
src_terms: ['asset quality', 'banking system', 'countercyclical macroprudential measure', 'foreign exchange reserve', 'property market']

terms: {'hong kong dollar funding': '港元資金流向', 'banking stability': '銀行體系穩定', 'banking supervision': '銀行監管', 'contingency plan': '應變規劃', 'credit and liquidity risk': '信用及流動性風險', 'market surveillance': '市場監察', 'stress test': '壓力測試'}
src_raw: Market surveillance and banking supervision make up the core part of our work in maintaining monetary and banking stability, and we have been strengthening our surveillance and supervisory framework from time to time. Apart from close monitoring of the credit and liquidity risks of banks, one of our new endeavours in the year was to make use of technology and granular data collected from banks to enhance our capability to monitor Hong Kong dollar funding and financial market activities in a more in-depth and timely manner. Stress tests and contingency planning have also been augmented in the light of the fast evolving economic and operating environment.
mt_raw: 市場監測與銀行監管是維持貨幣及銀行體系穩定的核心工作，我們一直致力加強相關監管。除了密切監控銀行信貸及流動性風險外，今年我們重點關注的是利用數據分析技術，更深入、更及時地監察港元資金流動及金融市場活動。面對快速演變的經濟環境，我們同時也強化了壓力測試及應急預備計劃。

terms: {'fatf': '財務行動特別組織', 'financial action task force': '財務行動特別組織', 'international monetary fund': '國際貨幣基金組織', 'mutual evaluation': '相互評估', 'regulatory regime': '監管制度'}
src_raw: Indeed, our robust regulatory regime has won strong endorsements internationally. During the year, the International Monetary Fund reaffirmed that Hong Kong was well placed to address both cyclical and structural changes, given its significant buffers. Hong Kong’s effective legal and institutional framework for combatting money laundering and terrorist financing also obtained a positive assessment from the Financial Action Task Force (FATF), making Hong Kong the first in the Asia-pacific region to achieve an overall compliant result in the FATF’s Mutual Evaluation.
mt_raw: 的確，我們穩健的監管體制已獲得國際社會的廣泛認可。今年內，國際貨幣基金組織重申，香港憑藉充足的緩衝機制，已具備應對週期性及結構性變革的良好條件。香港在打擊洗錢及恐怖主義融資方面的有效法律與制度框架，亦獲得金融行動特別工作組（FATF）的正面評價，使香港成為亞太地區首個在FATF相互評估中取得整體合規結果的地區。

terms: {'banking system': '銀行體系'}
src_raw: Confidence is the foundation for the proper functioning of markets and is crucial to the safeguarding of monetary and financial stability. To maintain market confidence, we have to be on high alert for, and respond swiftly to, any malicious rumours that may potentially cast doubt on Hong Kong’s monetary or banking systems. This is particularly important given the prevalent use of social media and instant messaging nowadays. While a variety of rumours were spread on social media platforms by fearmongers during the outbreak of social unrest, our quick and clear rebuttals to these rumours through social media, in addition to traditional media, proved useful and effective in clearing the air, quelling false rumours from spreading further, and upholding international and public confidence in our systems.
mt_raw: 信心是市場正常運作的基石，對維護貨幣及金融穩定至關重要。為維持市場信心，我們必須保持高度警惕，並迅速回應任何可能對香港貨幣或銀行體系產生質疑的惡意謠言。尤其在當前社交媒體及即時通訊工具廣泛使用的背景下，這一點尤為重要。在社會動盪期間，一些煽動者透過社交媒體平台散播謠言，我們透過社交媒體及傳統媒體迅速且清晰地駁斥這些謠言，有效澄清事實、遏制謠言擴散，並維護國際及公眾對我們體系的信心。
alg_terms: {'banking system': '銀行體系'}
norm_tgt_terms: ['銀行體系']

terms: {'the banking sector': '銀行體系'}
src_raw: The banking sector, as an essential pillar of economic activity, plays a fundamental role in ensuring the smooth running of society and the economy. Despite the challenging operating environment since the latter half of the year, banks have been working hard alongside others and doing their utmost to maintain normal operation of their core functions and continue serving businesses and the public.
mt_raw: 銀行業作為經濟活動的重要基石，在確保社會與經濟順暢運作方面扮演著舉足輕重的角色。儘管自今年下半年以來營運環境充滿挑戰，銀行業仍與各界攜手努力，竭盡所能維持核心業務的正常運作，並持續為企業和公眾提供服務。
alg_terms: {'the banking sector': '銀行業'}
norm_tgt_terms: ['銀行業']

terms: {'banking sector sme lending coordination mechanism': '銀行業中小企貸款協調機制', 'countercyclical capital buffer ratio': '逆周期緩衝資本比率', 'banking stability': '銀行體系穩定', 'basic banking service': '基本銀行服務', 'lending capacity': '借貸空間', 'regulatory reserve requirement': '監管儲備水平', 'relief measure': '紓緩措施', 'small and medium - sized enterprise': '中小企', 'the banking sector': '銀行體系'}
src_raw: In addition to basic banking services like deposits and transfers, an important function of banks is in extending credit to borrowers in support of the real economy. We are well aware of, and concerned about, the cash-flow problem facing businesses, especially small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs), under the difficult economic conditions. While safeguarding banking stability, we have launched a number of initiatives to ensure continued funding support to SMEs. In particular, the Countercyclical Capital Buffer ratio of banks was reduced on two occasions, in October 2019 and March 2020, by a total of 150 basis points to 1.0%; the level of regulatory reserve requirement on banks was also reduced by half in April 2020. These measures release a total of around HK$1 trillion in lending capacity, providing banks with more room for lending to enterprises including SMEs. We have also set up a platform – the Banking Sector SME Lending Coordination Mechanism – bringing together major banks in Hong Kong to explore and discuss specific measures to strengthen funding support for SMEs. I am pleased to see that many banks have responded proactively to our call and introduced relief measures such as principal moratorium for customers in need to ride out the storm.
mt_raw: 除基本的銀行服務如存款及轉帳外，銀行的重要功能在於向借款人提供信貸，以支持實體經濟。我們深知並關注在艱難的經濟環境下，企業，特別是中小企業（SMEs）所面臨的現金流問題。在維護銀行體系穩定的同時，我們已推出一系列措施，以確保持續向中小企業提供資金支持。特別是，銀行的逆週期資本緩衝比率在2019年10月及2020年3月兩度調降，總計降低150個基點至1.0%；2020年4月，銀行的法定準備金率亦減半。這些措施釋放約1萬億港元的貸款能力，為銀行提供更多貸款空間，以支持包括中小企業在內的企業。我們亦設立了一個平台——銀行業中小企業貸款協調機制，匯集香港主要銀行，探討具體措施以加強對中小企業的資金支持。我很高興看到許多銀行積極響應我們的呼籲，為有需要的客戶推出本金延遲還款等紓緩措施，幫助他們渡過難關。

terms: {'hkma': '金管局', 'bank account': '銀行帳戶', 'customer due diligence process': '客戶盡職審查程序', 'financial inclusion': '普及金融', 'tiered account service': '分層帳戶服務', 'simple bank accounts': '簡易帳戶', 'sba': '簡易帳戶', 'customer due diligence': '客戶盡職審查'}
src_raw: In view of some SMEs’ feedback about difficulties in opening bank accounts, which is the very first step in accessing various banking services, we have made dedicated efforts to address this issue over the past few years. Our work is bearing fruit, as improvement in account opening for businesses is visible. As a further step to promote financial inclusion, the HKMA spearheaded the launch of tiered account services – Simple Bank Accounts (SBAs) with a streamlined customer due diligence process – to provide start-ups and SMEs with an alternative to traditional bank accounts. More than 2,800 SBAs have been opened so far.
mt_raw: 鑒於部分中小企業反映在開設銀行帳戶方面遇到困難，而開設銀行帳戶是獲取各項銀行服務的第一步，我們過去幾年已投入專注的努力來解決這個問題。 我們的努力正在產生成效，商戶開設銀行帳戶的情況可見改善。 作為進一步推動金融普惠性的舉措，香港金融管理局主導推出分層銀行服務——簡化客戶審查程序的簡易銀行帳戶（SBA），為初創企業和中小企業提供傳統銀行帳戶的替代方案。 截至目前，已開設超過2,800個簡易銀行帳戶。

src_raw: We have always been mindful of the need to strike a reasonable balance between regulation and development. Given the intense competition among financial centres, we have to work hard to strengthen Hong Kong’s competitiveness as an international financial centre and thereby ensure its longer term stability. There are four key areas of work: technology, green finance, financial connectivity with the Mainland, and talent development.
mt_raw: 我們一直都深知在監管與發展之間取得合理的平衡至關重要。 鑒於金融中心之間的激烈競爭，我們必須努力提升香港作為國際金融中心的競爭力，從而確保其長遠的穩定。 我們有四個關鍵的工作領域：科技、綠色金融、與內地金融互聯互通，以及人才發展。

mt_raw: 自2016年香港金融管理局成立金融科技促進辦公室，及2017年推出智慧銀行計劃以來，香港積極推動金融科技發展。

terms: {'tax , rate and water charge': '稅款、差餉及水費', 'fast payment system': '轉數快', 'fps': '快速支付系統「轉數快」'}
src_raw: On the payment front, the vibrancy of the fintech ecosystem is evident in the strong momentum in the adoption of the Faster Payment System (FPS), the world’s first multi-currency, cross-banks and e-wallets, real-time retail payment platform. FPS registrations reached four million within a short span of 15 months, representing a high rate of penetration in a population of 7.5 million people. The Government has also adopted the FPS to provide the public with greater convenience in paying taxes, rates and water charges. More and more businesses are expected to use this fast, safe and convenient means of receiving and making payment to enhance operational efficiency.
mt_raw: 在支付方面，金融科技生態系統的蓬勃發展可見於快速支付系統（FPS）的強勁推廣勢頭，這是一個全球首創的多幣種、跨銀行及電子錢包，提供即時零售支付的平台。短短15個月內，FPS的註冊用戶已達四百萬，在七百五萬人口中展現出極高的普及率。政府亦已採用FPS，為公眾提供更便捷的繳稅、市政費及水費方式。預計越來越多的商戶將會使用這個快捷、安全及方便的收款及付款途徑，以提升營運效率。

terms: {'hkma': '金管局', 'open application programming interfaces': '開放應用程式介面', 'banking product and service': '銀行產品及服務', 'technology risk management': '科技風險管理', 'the banking sector': '銀行體系'}
src_raw: In the banking sector, significant progress was seen in applying fintech to their banking services and business operations. According to a study conducted by the HKMA, almost 90% of the surveyed retail banks have adopted, or are planning to adopt, artificial intelligence in their business applications. With the HKMA’s facilitation, banks have been applying big data and consumer behavioural analytics in their personal credit products. They have also launched over 800 Open Application programming Interfaces in the first two phases, covering a range of banking products and services. While encouraging banks to use fintech, we did not lose sight of the need for enhanced technology risk management and consumer protection in digital banking services. Timely supervisory guidance has been provided to banks in these areas.
mt_raw: 在銀行業方面，應用金融科技於銀行服務及業務運作方面已取得顯著進展。根據香港金融管理局（HKMA）進行的研究，近九成受訪零售銀行已採用或正計劃在業務應用中引入人工智能。在HKMA的推動下，銀行已將大數據及消費者行為分析應用於個人信貸產品。此外，銀行亦在首兩階段推出了逾800個開放應用程式介面（API），涵蓋多種銀行產品及服務。我們在鼓勵銀行應用金融科技的同時，亦未有忽視數碼銀行服務中加強科技風險管理及消費者保護的需要。HKMA已針對這些範疇，適時向銀行提供監管指引。

src_raw: Regulatory technology (Regtech) is another area of great interest to banks, for its potential of enabling banks to conduct regulatory compliance and risk management, particularly in anti-money laundering and counter-financing of terrorism (AML/CFT), more efficiently and cost-effectively. To facilitate greater industry adoption of Regtech and the building of a wider Regtech ecosystem, the HKMA organised the inaugural AML/CFT Regtech Forum and issued its first Regtech newsletter in November to discuss possible use cases of Regtech. At the same time, the HKMA, as a banking supervisor, is exploring the use of supervisory technology (Suptech), including new data science and analytics, to enhance work effectiveness and efficiency. We have embarked on a series of studies and developed a road map for the implementation of Suptech in the next few years.
mt_raw: 監管科技（Regtech）是銀行極為關注的另一個領域，因其潛力可協助銀行更高效且更具成本效益地進行合規及風險管理，尤其是在反洗錢及反恐融資（AML/CFT）方面。為促進業界更廣泛採用Regtech，並建立更廣泛的Regtech生態系統，香港金融管理局（HKMA）於11月舉辦了首屆AML/CFT Regtech論壇，並發佈首期Regtech通訊，探討Regtech的潛在應用案例。同時，作為銀行監管機構，HKMA亦正在探索運用監管科技（Suptech），包括新的數據科學與分析技術，以提升監管工作的效率與成效。我們已啟動一系列研究，並制定了未來幾年推行Suptech的路線圖。

src_raw: From a broader perspective, this is only the start of the fintech journey in the banking sector. The HKMA granted eight licences to virtual banks during the year. src_raw: More exciting developments are also expected at the international level. src_raw: As the manager of the Exchange Fund, the HKMA actively advances responsible investment by integrating environmental, social and governance (ESG) factors into its investment activities. After venturing into the green bond market in 2015 as one of the early investors, we will continue to grow our green bond portfolio and invest in other ESG assets. We will also join hands with like-minded investors and regulators to promote best practices on ESG through our participation in international organisations in the ESG community.
mt_raw: 作為外匯基金的經理，金管局積極推動負責任投資，將環境、社會及管治（ESG）因素融入投資活動中。具體而言，我們已採納以風險調整後基準，在長期回報相若的情況下，優先考慮綠色及ESG投資的原則。自2015年作為早期投資者之一進入綠色債券市場以來，我們將繼續擴大綠色債券投資組合，並投資其他ESG資產。我們亦會攜手志同道合的投資者和監管機構，透過參與國際組織及ESG社群，推廣ESG的最佳實務。

src_raw: Financial Action Task Force (FATF) and Asia/Pacific Group on Money Laundering publish the Mutual Evaluation Report on Hong Kong’s anti-money laundering and counter-financing of terrorism (AML/CFT) regime. src_raw: The Hong Kong economy contracted in 2019, reflecting global economic slowdown, lingering US-China trade conflicts and local social incidents. As economic conditions deteriorated rapidly in the second half of the year, the labour market faced increasing pressures. Inflation also increased due to a sharp rise in pork prices. Economic performance for 2020 is expected to remain challenging as the novel coronavirus outbreak hits the already weakening economy. Given the difficult economic environment, the Government and the HKMA have rolled out measures to support the economy, especially households and small and medium-sized enterprises.
mt_raw: 2019年香港經濟出現收縮，反映全球經濟放緩、持續的中美貿易摩擦及本地社會事件的影響。 隨着下半年經濟情況持續惡化，勞動市場承受了更大的壓力。 豬肉價格急漲也導致通脹上升。 預計2020年的經濟表現將繼續面臨挑戰，新型冠狀病毒疫情進一步衝擊本已疲弱的經濟。 鑒於此，政府及金管局已推出一系列措施，以支持經濟，特別是家庭及中小企業。

terms: {'chart 1': '圖1', 'export of service': '服務輸出', 'gdp': '本地生產總值', 'gross domestic product': '本地生產總值', 'business sentiment': '營商氣氛', 'export of goods': '貨品出口', 'external front': '對外方面', 'import of goods and service': '貨品進口及服務輸入', 'inbound tourism': '訪港旅遊業', 'investment spend': '投資支出', 'net trade': '淨出口（貿易順差）', 'private consumption expenditure': '私人消費支出'}
src_raw: Following a 2.9% expansion in 2018, the Hong Kong economy contracted by 1.2% in 2019, marking the first annual contraction since 2009. In particular, the economy entered into a recession in the second half of the year, with the seasonally adjusted real Gross Domestic Product (GDP) shrinking consecutively in the second, third and fourth quarters (Table 1). The decline in economic activities reflected a notable reduction in domestic demand (Chart 1). As the local social incidents weighed significantly on consumption activities and sentiments in the latter part of the year, private consumption expenditure recorded the first annual decline since 2003. Overall investment spending also dropped amid dampened business sentiments. On the external front, slowing global economic growth and additional tariffs levied amid the US-China trade tensions led to a decline in Hong Kong’s exports of goods. Exports of services also saw the largest annual decline on record because the social incidents led to a severe deterioration in inbound tourism. With smaller domestic and re-export-induced demand, imports of goods and services also worsened. On a net basis, net trade contributed positively to GDP in 2019 (Chart 1) because total imports declined even faster than total exports.
mt_raw: 繼2018年增長2.9%後，香港經濟於2019年收縮1.2%，為自2009年以來的首次年度負增長。尤其是在下半年，經濟陷入衰退，經季節性調整的實質國內生產總值（GDP）連續第二、三、四個季度下降（表1）。經濟活動的下滑反映了本地需求的顯著減少（圖1）。由於年底本地社會事件嚴重影響了消費活動和情緒，私人消費支出自2003年以來首次錄得年度下降。整體投資支出也因企業情緒低落而下降。在外部方面，全球經濟增長放緩以及中美貿易緊張局勢下額外徵收的關稅導致香港商品出口下降。由於社會事件導致入境旅遊嚴重惡化，服務出口也錄得歷史上最大的年度降幅。由於本地需求和轉口需求減少，商品和服務的進口也隨之惡化。綜合來看，淨貿易在2019年對GDP的貢獻為正（圖1），因為總進口下降的速度比總出口更快。

terms: {'80 % guarantee product': '八成信貸擔保產品', '90 % loan guarantee product': '九成信貸擔保產品', 'banking sector sme lending coordination mechanism': '銀行業中小企貸款協調機制', 'countercyclical capital buffer ratio': '逆周期緩衝資本比率', 'guarantee product': '信貸擔保產品', 'hkma': '金管局', 'sfgs': '中小企融資擔保計劃', 'bank credit': '銀行貸款', 'cash flow': '現金流量', 'relief measure': '紓緩措施', 'small and medium - sized enterprise': '中小企', 'sme financing guarantee scheme': '中小企融資擔保計劃'}
src_raw: In view of the strong economic headwinds, the Government introduced several rounds of measures between August and December 2019 to alleviate the financial burden of residents, safeguard jobs and support enterprises, particularly small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) as well as those in the hard-hit sectors, such as retail, food services, transport and tourism. To allow banks to be more supportive to the domestic economy and help mitigate the economic cycle, the HKMA announced on 14 October a reduction in the Countercyclical Capital Buffer ratio of banks from 2.5% to 2.0%, thereby providing banks with more flexibility to release HK$200–300 billion in bank credit to enterprises including SMEs, and also established a Banking Sector SME Lending Coordination Mechanism. A new relief measure for the 80% Guarantee product of the SME Financing Guarantee Scheme (SFGS) was introduced in September, allowing SME borrowers facing weakening cash flows to apply for principal moratorium to get immediate support. Further, a new 90% loan guarantee product under the SFGS was introduced in December to provide additional support to SMEs, businesses with relatively less operating experience, as well as professionals seeking to set up their own practices, to obtain financing.
mt_raw: 鑑於經濟面臨強勁逆風，政府於2019年8月至12月期間推出多輪措施，以減輕居民的財務負擔、保障就業及支持企業，特別是中小企業以及零售、餐飲服務、運輸及旅遊等受影響較大的行業。為讓銀行更能支持本地經濟並協助緩解經濟週期，香港金融管理局（金管局）於10月14日宣布將銀行的逆週期資本緩衝比率由2.5%調降至2.0%，從而為銀行提供更大的靈活性，釋放約200至300億港元的銀行信貸予企業，包括中小企業。同時，亦設立銀行業中小企業貸款協調機制。為支援中小企業，中小企業融資擔保計劃（SFGS）於9月推出80%擔保產品的新紓困措施，讓因現金流減弱而面臨困難的中小企業借款人可申請本金寬限期，以獲得即時支援。此外，SFGS於12月更推出90%貸款擔保產品，為中小企業、經營經驗相對較少的企業，以及希望開設個人業務的專業人士提供額外的融資支持。

src_raw: The Hong Kong dollar exchange rate and money markets functioned in a smooth and orderly manner in 2019. The Hong Kong dollar exchange rate remained broadly stable throughout the year. As the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered in March, the HKMA purchased Hong Kong dollars from, and sold US dollars to, banks at the rate of HK$7.85/US$1, leading to a decline in the Aggregate Balance in accordance with the design of the Linked Exchange Rate System. The Hong Kong dollar interbank interest rates remained largely steady at the longer end, while short-term rates generally picked up. At the retail level, several retail banks lowered their Best Lending Rates by 12.5 basis points in late October following the decreases in the target range for the US federal funds rate. As for monetary aggregates, total bank loans increased by 6.7% in 2019, up from 4.4% in 2018, and total deposits grew by 2.9% during the year.
mt_raw: 2019年，港元匯率及貨幣市場運作順暢有序。全年來，港元匯率大致穩定。由於在三月觸發了弱方兌換保證機制，香港金融管理局以7.85港元兌1美元的匯率向銀行購入港元，並向銀行出售美元，導致根據聯繫匯率制度的設計，總結餘有所下降。港元銀行間利率在長期端大致保持穩定，而短期利率則普遍上升。在零售層面，繼美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍下調後，多間零售銀行於十月底將其最佳貸款利率下調12.5個基點。至於貨幣供應總額，2019年銀行總貸款額增加6.7%，較2018年的4.4%有所上升，而全年總存款額則增長2.9%。

terms: {'consolidation': '綜合', 'consumer price inflation': '消費物價指數', 'housing component': '租金組成項目', 'one - off relief measure': '一次性紓困措施', 'relief measure': '紓緩措施'}
src_raw: The underlying inflation rate, which nets out the effects of the Government’s one-off relief measures, rose slightly to 3.0% in 2019, from 2.6% in 2018. The mild increase in inflation was mainly driven by the elevated pork prices due to the disrupted supply of fresh pork since May (Chart 2). Excluding basic food items, price pressures were held at moderate levels throughout the year. In particular, the housing component of consumer price inflation softened in tandem with an earlier consolidation of fresh-letting private residential rentals. More broadly, the mild growth in nominal wages and the slower increase in commercial rentals1 helped keep local business costs in check. Externally, import price inflation moderated, in line with lower inflation in some of Hong Kong’s major import sources amid slower global economic growth.
mt_raw: 剔除政府一次性纾困措施影響後，核心通脹率於2019年微升至3.0%，較2018年的2.6%略高。通脹溫和上升主要受惠於自五月起鮮肉供應受阻，導致豬肉價格上漲（見圖2）。撇除基本食品項目外，全年物價壓力維持於適中水平。特別是，消費者物價指數中的住宅部分，隨著私人住宅租賃市場的盤整而有所回落。更廣泛地說，名義工資增長以及商業租金增幅放緩有助於控制本地企業成本。外部方面，進口物價通脹溫和，與主要進口來源地通脹放緩以及全球經濟增長減慢相符。

terms: {'labour market': '勞工市場', 'construction sector': '建造業', 'consumption and tourism - related sector': '消費及旅遊相關行業', 'labour force participation rate': '勞動人口參與率', 'nominal wage and earnings': '名義工資及收入', 'unemployment rate': '失業率'}
src_raw: The labour market remained broadly resilient in the first half of 2019 but faced mounting pressures in the second half (Chart 3). After staying at a multi-year low of 2.8% in the first two quarters, the seasonally adjusted unemployment rate rose to 2.9% in the third quarter and 3.3% in the final quarter, with those for the consumption and tourism-related sectors recording even more visible rises amid the social incidents. Overall labour demand also shrank visibly in the latter part of the year as total employment and the number of privatesector vacancies fell. The reduction in labour demand was particularly prominent in the retail, accommodation and food services sectors, as well as import/export trade and construction sectors. On the supply side, the labour force participation rate edged down, partly due to a cyclical response to the economic recession. As the labour market came under increasing pressures, growth in nominal wage and earnings showed signs of a slowdown towards the end of the year.
mt_raw: 2019年上半年，勞動市場表現穩健，但下半年面臨日益嚴峻的挑戰（見圖表3）。前兩個季度，經季節調整後的失業率維持於多年來的低點2.8%。然而，第三季升至2.9%，第四季進一步攀升至3.3%。尤其受到社會事件影響，消費及旅遊相關行業的失業率顯著上升。整體勞動需求在下半年明顯下滑，總就業人數和私營部門的空缺職位均有所減少。零售、餐飲、住宿服務業，以及進出口貿易和建築業等行業的勞動需求降幅尤為顯著。在勞動力供給方面，勞動參與率略為下降，部分原因在於對經濟衰退的應對。隨著勞動市場承受更大壓力，年底名義工資和薪資增長趨於放緩。

terms: {'hang seng index': '恒生指數', 'mainland': '內地', 'mainland china': '中國內地', 'mainland tech company': '內地科技公司', 'stock market': '股市', 'central bank': '中央銀行', 'equity': '股票', 'equity fund': '集資總額', 'initial public offering': '首次公開招股', 'ipos': '首次公開招股'}
src_raw: The local stock market experienced sharp fluctuations during 2019. After a market rally in the first four months, the Hang Seng Index plunged in May due in part to concerns about the re-escalation of the US-China trade tensions (Chart 4). While recouping some lost ground in June in response to major central banks’ signals of a more accommodative monetary stance, stock prices came under pressure again amid slowing global economic growth and local social incidents. Towards the end of the year, stock prices regained some upward momentum following the announcement of a “phase one” trade agreement between the US and Mainland China. The Hang Seng Index finished the year at 28,190, registering an overall gain of 9.1% for the year. By contrast, the average daily turnover declined by about 19% from a year earlier. The listings of a major Mainland tech company and a leading beer manufacturer helped expand equity funds raised through initial public offerings (IpOs) to HK$314.2 billion in 2019. Hong Kong ranked first globally in terms of funds raised through IpOs for a second straight year in 2019.
mt_raw: 2019年本地股市出現劇烈波動。在頭四個月市場上漲後，由於對中美貿易戰再度升級的擔憂，恒生指數於5月急跌（見圖表4）。儘管6月因主要央行釋出更為寬鬆的貨幣政策信號而收復部分失地，但隨着全球經濟增長放緩及本地社會事件，股價再度受壓。年內末段，美國與中國內地宣布達成「第一階段」貿易協議後，股價重拾上升動能。恒生指數全年收於28,190點，累計上漲9.1%。相比之下，平均每日成交額較去年同期下降約19%。一家主要中國內地科技公司及一家領先啤酒製造商的上市，使2019年透過首次公開招股（IPO）籌集的股本資金增至3142億港元。香港在2019年連續第二年在全球首次公開招股集資額中排名第一。

terms: {'hong kong mortgage corporation': '香港按揭證券有限公司', 'mortgage insurance programme': '按揭保險計劃', 'housing affordability': '置業負擔能力', 'income - gear ratio': '收入槓桿比率', 'non-residential property market': '非住宅物業市場', 'property market': '物業市場', 'hkmc': '香港按揭證券有限公司（按揭證券公司）'}
src_raw: The residential property market staged a strong rebound in the first five months of 2019 but generally softened in the remainder of the year. Market sentiment improved in early 2019 partly because concerns over US-China trade tensions temporarily eased, but the sentiment was dampened afterwards by the re-escalated US-China trade tensions, prolonged social incidents and weakened domestic economic conditions. Overall housing prices moderated by 5% from the peak in May through December, though still recording an annual growth of 5% due to a 10% rebound in the first five months (Chart 4). Transaction volume in 2019 increased by 4% to 59,797 units from a year earlier, reflecting the strong trading activities in the early part of the year. Housing affordability remained stretched, with the price-toincome ratio and the income-gearing ratio staying high at 17.9 and 80.9 respectively, far above their long-term averages.2 To assist home buyers with immediate housing needs, the Hong Kong Mortgage Corporation (HKMC) in mid-October raised the cap on the value of completed residential properties eligible for a mortgage loan under the Mortgage Insurance programme.3 On the other hand, the non-residential property market faced stronger downward pressures in 2019. In particular, both prices and rentals for retail premises registered the largest declines since the global financial crisis in 2008, reflecting the worsening business conditions during the year.
mt_raw: 2019年前五個月，住宅物業市場出現強勁反彈，但其餘時間整體表現趨弱。2019年初市場情緒有所改善，部分原因是對中美貿易緊張關係的擔憂暫時緩和，但隨後中美貿易緊張關係再度升級、社會事件延續以及國內經濟狀況惡化，使市場情緒受到打擊。整體樓價從5月至12月間從峰值回落了5%，但由於前五個月樓價反彈了10%，因此全年樓價仍錄得5%的年增長（圖4）。2019年的交易量較去年同期增加4%，達到59,797個單位，反映出年初交易活動較為活躍。房屋負擔能力仍然緊張，價格與收入比率及收入負擔比率分別高達17.9和80.9，遠高於長期平均水平。為協助有迫切住房需求的買家，香港按揭證券有限公司（HKMC）於10月中提高按揭保險計劃中可申請按揭貸款的已完成住宅物業價值上限。另一方面，2019年非住宅物業市場面臨更強的下行壓力。特別是零售物業的價格和租金自2008年全球金融危機以來錄得最大跌幅，反映出當年業務環境惡化。

terms: {'100 % government guarantee': '政府百分百擔保', 'countercyclical capital buffer ratio': '逆周期緩衝資本比率', 'gdp': '本地生產總值', 'hkma': '金管局', 'mainland': '內地', 'mainland china': '中國內地', 'sfgs': '中小企融資擔保計劃', 'associate': '聯營公司', 'concessionary low - interest loan': '特惠低息貸款', 'coronavirus outbreak': '冠狀病毒爆發', 'countercyclical fiscal measure': '逆周期財政措施', 'cross - border economic activity': '跨境經濟活動', 'external front': '對外方面', 'infrastructure': '基建', 'international organisation': '國際組織', 'one - off cash handout': '一次性派發現金', 'real gdp growth': '實質本地生產總值增長', 'regional supply chain disruption': '區內供應鏈運作'}
src_raw: Hong Kong’s economic performance for 2020 is expected to be very challenging, with significant near-term downside risks associated with the coronavirus outbreak. Some sectors, such as retail, accommodation, food services, tourism and transport, which have yet to recover from the disruptions caused by the social incidents, will be doubly hit. However, the countercyclical fiscal measures announced in the 2020/21 Budget, which include a one-off cash handout and a new concessionary low-interest loan under the SFGS with 100% Government guarantee, are expected to provide some support to the economy, especially households and SMEs. On 16 March 2020, the HKMA further reduced the Countercyclical Capital Buffer ratio of banks from 2.0% to 1.0%, which will allow banks to be more supportive to the domestic economy, in particular those sectors and individuals that are expected to experience additional short-term stress due to the impact arising from the coronavirus outbreak. Analysed by GDP component, private consumption and investment are likely to remain weak because of the fragile consumer and business confidence. While government consumption will contribute to economic growth, public investment expenditure is anticipated to be relatively sluggish following the completion of some major infrastructure projects. On the external front, the “phase one” trade deal between the US and Mainland China is assessed to be slightly positive for the local economy in the short term. However, Hong Kong’s external trade performance will continue to be weighed down by weak global economic growth and trade flows. In particular, the coronavirus outbreak may lead to regional supply chain disruptions and slower cross-border economic activities, in tourism for example, thereby restraining Hong Kong’s exports. The Government forecasts real GDP growth for 2020 in the range of -1.5% to 0.5%, while growth forecasts by international organisations and privatesector analysts averaged -3.3%.
mt_raw: 香港2020年的經濟表現預料將具備相當大的挑戰，並伴隨新冠疫情爆發所帶來的顯著下行風險。零售、住宿、餐飲、旅遊和交通等行業，在尚未從早前社會事件的影響中完全復甦的情況下，將再次遭受衝擊。然而，2020/21年度財政預算案中公布的逆周期財政措施，包括一次性現金派發，以及在信貸保障計劃下提供政府百分百擔保的新優惠低息貸款，料將為經濟，特別是家庭和中小企業提供支持。香港金融管理局於2020年3月16日進一步將銀行的逆周期資本緩衝比率從2.0%降低至1.0%，藉此鼓勵銀行更積極地支持本地經濟，尤其協助預期因疫情而面臨短期壓力的行業和個人。從GDP組成部分分析，由於消費者和企業信心仍然脆弱，私人消費和投資可能持續偏弱。雖然政府消費將有助於經濟增長，但隨著部分大型基建項目的竣工，公共投資開支預計將相對趨緩。在外部方面，美國與中國大陸之間的「第一階段」貿易協議短期內對本地經濟的影響被視為略為正面。然而，香港的對外貿易表現仍將受到全球經濟增長乏力和貿易流量低迷的拖累。特別是，疫情可能導致區域供應鏈中斷和跨境經濟活動放緩，例如旅遊業，進而影響香港的出口。政府預測2020年實際GDP增長介於-1.5%至0.5%之間，而國際組織和私人分析師的預測平均為-3.3%。

src_raw: The subdued economic outlook for 2020 is subject to a number of uncertainties and risks, including those stemming from the slowing global economy, US-China trade relations, Mainland’s economic performance, local social incidents and the persistence of the coronavirus outbreak. In particular, a prolonged coronavirus outbreak could trigger a more visible global economic slowdown and a repricing of assets, with the resulting unfavourable macroeconomic environment and tighter financial conditions posing further downward pressures on domestic real activities. However, the more concerted effort by major central banks to ease their monetary policies may provide a cushion against the negative economic impact inflicted by the outbreak.
mt_raw: 2020年的經濟展望相對低迷，面臨許多不確定性和風險，包括來自全球經濟減速、中美貿易關係、內地經濟表現、地方社會事件以及新型冠狀病毒疫情持續等多方面的因素。特別是，新型冠狀病毒疫情若持續蔓延，可能引發更明顯的全球經濟減速及資產重新定價，進而導致不利的宏觀經濟環境與更緊縮的金融條件，對國內實體經濟活動造成進一步的下行壓力。然而，主要中央銀行更積極地採取寬鬆貨幣政策的行動，可能有助於緩衝疫情所造成的負面經濟影響。

src_raw: The overriding objective of Hong Kong’s monetary policy is currency stability. This is defined as a stable external exchange value of Hong Kong’s currency, in terms of its exchange rate in the foreign-exchange market against the US dollar, within a band of HK$7.75–7.85 to US$1. The structure of the monetary system is characterised by Currency Board arrangements, requiring the Monetary Base to be at least 100% backed by US dollar reserves held in the Exchange Fund, and changes in the Monetary Base to be 100% matched by corresponding changes in US dollar reserves.
mt_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是貨幣穩定。所謂貨幣穩定，是指香港貨幣在外汇市場上對美元的兌換價值保持穩定，即港元兌美元匯率維持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的範圍內。貨幣體系的結構特徵為貨幣發行局制度，要求貨幣基礎必須至少有100%由儲存在發行基金的美元儲備所支持，且貨幣基礎的變動必須與美元儲備的相應變動完全匹配。

src_raw: The stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate is maintained through an automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and the firm commitment by the HKMA to honour the Convertibility Undertakings (CUs). When the demand for Hong Kong dollars is greater than the supply and the market exchange rate strengthens to the strong-side CU of HK$7.75 to one US dollar, the HKMA stands ready to sell Hong Kong dollars to banks for US dollars upon request. The Aggregate Balance will then expand to push down Hong Kong dollar interest rates, creating monetary conditions that move the Hong Kong dollar away from the strong-side limit to within the Convertibility Zone of 7.75 to 7.85. Conversely, if the supply of Hong Kong dollars is greater than demand and the market exchange rate weakens to the weak-side CU of HK$7.85 to one US dollar, the HKMA stands ready to buy Hong Kong dollars from banks upon request. The Aggregate Balance will then contract to drive Hong Kong dollar interest rates up, pushing the Hong Kong dollar away from the weak-side limit to stay within the Convertibility Zone.
mt_raw: 港元匯率的穩定，透過自動調整利率機制及香港金融管理局（HKMA）堅定履行可兌換承諾（CUs）來維持。當港元需求大於供應，市場匯率強升至強方兌換承諾水平（每1美元兌7.75港元）時，HKMA會根據銀行要求，出售港元以換取美元。總結餘隨即擴張，壓低港元利率，創造貨幣條件，使港元匯率從強方限制水平移離，並維持於7.75至7.85的可兌換範圍內。反之，若港元供應大於需求，市場匯率弱跌至弱方兌換承諾水平（每1美元兌7.85港元）時，HKMA亦會根據銀行要求，購入港元。總結餘隨即收縮，推高港元利率，使港元匯率從弱方限制水平移離，並維持於可兌換範圍內。

terms: {'cu': '兌換保證', 'chart 1': '圖1', 'carry trade': '套息活動', 'dividend payment': '派息', 'equity': '股票', 'equity - related demand': '股票相關港元需求', 'short hong kong dollar position': '港元短倉交易', 'weak - side cu': '弱方兌換保證匯率', 'initial public offer': '新股集資活動', 'ipo': '新股集資活動', 'ipos': '首次公開招股'}
src_raw: Despite uncertainties in the external environment and a slowdown in the domestic economy, the Hong Kong dollar remained stable and traded in a smooth and orderly manner in 2019. In the beginning of the year, the widening negative Hong Kong dollar-US dollar interest rate spreads attracted carry trade activities of selling Hong Kong dollars for US dollars, pushing the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate towards the weak-side CU of 7.85 (Chart 1). As the weakening of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate continued, the weak-side CU was eventually triggered eight times in March. Thereafter, the Hong Kong dollar continued to stay near the weak-side CU rate of 7.85. Since late May, the strong Hong Kong dollar demand arising from sizeable initial public offering (IPO) activities, corporates’ demand for dividend payment and the half-year closing had led the Hong Kong dollar to strengthen. While the Hong Kong dollar drifted lower after the half-year mark, it regained momentum from late October and stayed in the strong side of the Convertibility Zone towards the end of the year. This reflected partly equity-related demand including IPOs, and partly the unwinding of short Hong Kong dollar positions due to tightened liquidity near the year end. Overall, the Hong Kong dollar exchange market functioned normally throughout 2019.
mt_raw: 儘管外部環境存在不確定性，以及本地經濟增速放緩，2019年港元匯率仍保持穩定，交易順暢有序。年初時，港元與美元的負利率差擴大，吸引市場進行沽港元買美元的套利交易，推動港元兌美元匯率向弱方兌換保證區（CU）7.85靠攏（見圖1）。隨著港元匯率持續走弱，3月間弱方邊界共被觸發八次。其後，港元匯率持續維持在7.85的弱方邊界附近。自5月下旬起，因規模龐大的首次公開發行（IPO）活動、企業股息支付需求及半年結算所引致的強港元需求，港元匯率開始走強。雖然半年結算後港元一度回落，但自10月下旬起恢復動能，至年底時港元匯率已處於可兌換區間的強方邊界。這部分反映了與股權相關的需求，包括IPO活動，以及年底流動性收緊所導致的港元空頭頭寸平倉操作。總體而言，2019年港元匯兌市場運作正常。

src_raw: Due to the triggering of the weak-side CU, the total of the Aggregate Balance (before Discount Window) and outstanding EFBNs declined from HK$1,136.2 billion at the end of 2018 to HK$1,133.0 billion at the end of 2019 (Chart 2). During the year, the HKMA purchased a total of HK$22.1 billion at the request of banks at the weak-side CU of 7.85 in accordance with the design of the Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS), leading to a contraction of the Aggregate Balance (before Discount Window) from HK$76.4 billion at the end of 2018 to HK$54.3 billion at the end of 2019. The outstanding EFBNs increased slightly from HK$1,059.8 billion to HK$1,078.7 billion during the year, reflecting the issuance of EFBNs to absorb EFBNs’ interest payments according to the established practice. The Monetary Base as a whole remained fully backed by foreign exchange reserves. Total Aggregate Balance (before Discount Window) and outstanding Exchange Fund Bills and Notes at HK$1,133 billion at end-2019.
mt_raw: 由於弱方聯繫匯率機制啟動，結餘總額（撇除貼現窗）與未償還結單票據之總額，由2018年底的1,136.2億港元，降至2019年底的1,133.0億港元（見圖2）。 該年，香港金管局應銀行要求，按照聯繫匯率制度（LERS）的設計，在弱方聯繫匯率水平7.85厘下，共購買了22.1億港元，導致結餘總額（撇除貼現窗）從2018年底的76.4億港元，收縮至2019年底的54.3億港元。未償還結單票據則略有增加，由1,059.8億港元增至1,078.7億港元，反映了為支付結單票據利息而發行的結單票據，符合既定慣例。 貨幣基礎總體上仍得到外匯儲備的充分支持。截至2019年底，結餘總額（撇除貼現窗）與未償還結單票據總額為1,133億港元。

src_raw: The Base Rate was adjusted downwards on 1 August, 19 September and 31 October by a total of 75 basis points, from 2.75% at the end of 2018 to 2.00% in early November, as the target range for the US federal funds rate moved downward three times by a total of 75 basis points from 2.25–2.50% to 1.50–1.75% during the year. On 18–26 November and 19–31 December, the Base Rate was set higher than 2.00%, reflecting a marked upward trend of the overnight and one-month Hong Kong Interbank Offered Rates (HIBORs) in the last two months of the year. As such, the Base Rate closed at 2.49% at the end of 2019. The adjustment of the Base Rate was in accordance with the revised formula announced on 26 March 2009, which sets the Base Rate at either 50 basis points above the lower bound of the prevailing target range for the US federal funds rate or the average of the five-day moving averages of the overnight and one-month HIBORs, whichever is the higher. On the retail front, several retail banks lowered their Best Lending Rates by 12.5 basis points following the decrease in the target range for the US federal funds rate in late October.
mt_raw: 基準利率於8月1日、9月19日及10月31日共下調75個基點，由2018年底的2.75%降至2019年11月初的2.00%，因美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍在當年內三次下調共75個基點，由2.25–2.50%降至1.50–1.75%。11月18日至26日及12月19日至31日期間，基準利率高於2.00%，反映去年底兩個月內隔夜及一個月期香港銀行同業拆借利率（HIBOR）明顯上揚的趨勢。因此，基準利率於2019年底收於2.49%。基準利率的調整遵循2009年3月26日公佈的修訂公式，該公式規定基準利率為美國聯邦基金利率現行目標範圍下限之上50個基點，或隔夜及一個月期HIBOR五日移動平均值的平均數，以較高者為準。在零售銀行方面，多間零售銀行在10月下旬美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍下調後，將其最佳貸款利率下調12.5個基點。

src_raw: The discounts of the Hong Kong dollar forward points widened during the first two months, broadly tracking the movements of the Hong Kong dollar-US dollar interest rate spreads, with the 12-month Hong Kong dollar forward points reaching about -708 pips in mid-February (Chart 4). Thereafter, along with the narrowing of the negative Hong Kong dollar-US dollar interest rate spreads, the discounts of the Hong Kong dollar forward points narrowed gradually and turned to premiums towards the end of the year. Overall, Hong Kong’s money markets operated in an orderly manner. Discount Window borrowing decreased to HK$38.3 billion in 2019 from HK$40.2 billion in 2018.
mt_raw: 港元遠期點差在首兩個月擴大，大致追隨港元兌美元利率差的走勢，2月至中期12個月港元遠期點差達負708點左右（圖表4）。隨後，隨著港元兌美元負利率差的縮窄，港元遠期點差逐步收窄，並在年底轉為溢價。整體而言，香港貨幣市場運作暢順。於2019年，再貼現窗口借款減少至383億港元，較2018年的402億港元為低。

src_raw: The LERS has contributed significantly to Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability for more than three decades and has shown its resilience in multiple regional and global financial crises. Against the backdrop of social incidents happening during the year, a number of unfounded rumours casting doubt on the LERS and financial stability of Hong Kong circulated in the social media. The HKMA acted promptly and vigorously to rebut the rumours and reassure the public through the use of both traditional and social media, reiterating that the LERS would remain in place and Hong Kong would not impose foreign exchange or capital controls. In addition, the HKMA issued a number of articles to help the public understand the LERS operation, the flow of funds and the interest rate outlook. These efforts were effective in maintaining public confidence in the LERS, as evidenced by the orderly functioning of the markets throughout the year. The Government is also firmly committed to the LERS. public confidence in the Government’s commitment and the use of the Hong Kong dollar as a means of payment and storage of value were further reinforced by the stability in the foreign exchange and money markets. In its 2019 Article IV consultation with Hong Kong, the International Monetary Fund reaffirmed its long-standing support for the LERS as an anchor of Hong Kong’s financial stability, and commented that the LERS remained the appropriate exchange rate arrangement for Hong Kong underpinned by Hong Kong’s transparent rules, ample fiscal and foreign reserves, strong financial regulation and supervision, a flexible economy, and a prudent fiscal framework.
mt_raw: 貨幣發行局（LERS）在過去三十多年來對香港的貨幣及金融穩定作出了重大貢獻，並在多項區域及全球金融危機中展現出強韌性。面對當年社會事件的發生，一些無根據的謠言在社交媒體上流傳，質疑貨幣發行局及香港的金融穩定。香港金融管理局（HKMA）迅速且積極地反駁這些謠言，並透過傳統及社交媒體向公眾發出澄清，重申貨幣發行局將繼續維持現行制度，香港不會實施外匯或資本管制。此外，香港金融管理局亦發佈多篇文章，協助公眾了解貨幣發行局的運作、資金流動情況及利率展望。這些努力有效地維持了公眾對貨幣發行局的信心，從全年市場有序運作可見一斑。政府亦堅定支持貨幣發行局。公眾對政府承諾及港元作為支付手段和價值儲存工具的信心，亦因外匯及貨幣市場的穩定而進一步加強。在2019年對香港的第四條審查（Article IV consultation）中，國際貨幣基金組織（IMF）重申其長期支持貨幣發行局作為香港金融穩定的基石，並指出貨幣發行局仍是香港適當的匯率安排，這項安排由香港透明的規則、充足的財政及外匯儲備、強大的金融監管與監督、靈活的經濟體系以及謹慎的財政框架所支撐。

src_raw: A robust banking system is crucial to the normal functioning of the LERS. Hong Kong’s banking system is highly liquid and sound, with liquidity positions and capitalisation being well above the minimum international standards. To ensure the resilience of the banking sector, the HKMA has been closely monitoring banks’ management of credit, liquidity and interest rate risks and stress-test results, and has maintained its supervisory efforts on corporate, propertyrelated and Mainland-related lending. With a smaller Aggregate Balance relative to previous years, banks have in general strengthened their liquidity management arrangements and have been more proactive in managing their day-to-day funding positions. Furthermore, the HKMA has maintained close dialogue with banks to ensure smooth recycling of liquidity in the market, especially ahead of and during the subscription periods of large IPOs. No settlement gridlocks were noted during the year, with the Discount Window continuing to function effectively and efficiently.
mt_raw: 健全的銀行體系對LERS的正常運作至關重要。香港的銀行體系流動性高且穩健，其流動性水平及資本充足率均遠高於國際最低標準。為確保銀行業的韌性，香港金融管理局（HKMA）一直密切監測銀行對信貸、流動性及利率風險的管理情況，以及壓力測試結果，並持續加強對企業貸款、與物業相關貸款及與內地相關貸款的監管。與往年相比，銀行總結餘較為低，整體而言銀行已加強流動性管理安排，並更積極地管理日常資金頭寸。此外，HKMA亦與銀行保持密切對話，以確保市場流動性順暢循環，尤其是在大型首次公開招股（IPO）認購期前後。本年度未出現結算阻塞情況，貼現窗口繼續有效且高效運作。

src_raw: To improve the transparency of the Currency Board Account, a specific portion of Exchange Fund assets has been allocated to back the Monetary Base since October 1998. The Backing Ratio (defined as the Backing Assets divided by the Monetary Base) moved within a range of 109.9–112.1% during 2019, without touching the Upper or Lower Trigger Level. The ratio closed at 111.2% on 31 December (Chart 5). Under the LERS, while specific Exchange Fund assets have been designated for the Backing portfolio, all Exchange Fund assets are available to support the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate. In the event of abrupt shocks, the sizeable amount of financial resources of the Exchange Fund, together with Hong Kong’s robust banking system, will provide powerful support to Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability.
mt_raw: 為提高貨幣基金會賬戶的透明度，自1998年10月起，已指定一部分外匯基金資產用於支持貨幣基礎。2019年間，支持比率（定義為支持資產除以貨幣基礎）維持在109.9%至112.1%之間，未觸及上限或下限觸發水平。該比率於12月31日收於111.2%（圖表5）。根據聯繫匯率制度（LERS），雖然已指定特定外匯基金資產用於支持組合，但所有外匯基金資產均可用於支持港元匯率。在遭遇突發衝擊時，外匯基金龐大的財政資源，配合香港穩健的銀行體系，將為香港的貨幣與金融穩定提供強大支持。

src_raw: The Currency Board Sub-Committee (CBC) of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee monitors and reviews issues relevant to monetary and financial stability in Hong Kong. In 2019, the CBC considered issues including an event study on the LERS operations, the relationship between the Aggregate Balance and interest rates in Hong Kong, an improved and more flexible approach to options markets’ views about the LERS, and the impact of future IPOs on HIBORs. Records of the CBC’s discussions on these issues and reports on Currency Board operations submitted to the CBC are published on the HKMA website.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局諮詢委員會下的貨幣局小組委員會（CBC）負責監測和審視與香港貨幣及金融穩定相關的問題。2019年，CBC考慮了包括對聯繫匯率制度（LERS）運作的事件研究、香港總結餘與利率之間的關係、對選購權市場對LERS看法的改進和更靈活的處理方法，以及未來首次公開招股（IPO）對香港銀行同業拆借利率（HIBOR）的影響等問題。CBC就這些問題的討論記錄，以及提交給CBC的貨幣局運作報告，均會在香港金融管理局網站上發佈。

src_raw: The Hong Kong Institute for Monetary and Financial Research (HKIMR), formerly the Hong Kong Institute for Monetary Research, pursues research studies on topics in monetary policy, banking and finance that are policy relevant. This is reflected in the wide array of topics explored by HKIMR researchers and overseas visitors and in its conferences and events. The HKIMR collaborates with major central banks and policy institutions to jointly organise policy-focused conferences. Its research visiting programmes support research projects on policy issues that are of importance to the HKMA, Hong Kong and the region.
mt_raw: 香港貨幣與金融研究院（HKIMR），前身為香港貨幣研究院，致力於進行與貨幣政策、銀行及金融相關的政策研究。這一點體現在HKIMR研究人員與海外訪客所探討的廣泛主題，以及其舉辦的研討會和活動中。HKIMR與主要央行及政策機構合作，共同舉辦以政策為重點的研討會。其研究訪問計劃支持與香港金融管理局（HKMA）、香港特別行政區及地區內重要政策議題相關的研究項目。

terms: {'hkma': '金管局', 'authorize institution': '認可機構', 'credit and liquidity risk': '信用及流動性風險', 'technology risk management': '科技風險管理', 'the banking sector': '銀行體系'}
src_raw: The banking sector in Hong Kong remained sound and stable in 2019, notwithstanding the headwinds brought by the weakening global and local economies. Thanks to the concerted efforts of the industry, the banking sector continued to operate normally amidst the social events. Efforts were taken to ensure that inconvenience caused to the public was kept to a minimum. During the year, the HKMA focused its supervision on the credit and liquidity risk management of authorized institutions. In view of escalating cyber threats and the industry’s growing dependency on technology, the HKMA stepped up the supervision of authorized institutions’ technology risk management. On conduct supervision, the HKMA streamlined its investor protection measures to enhance customer experience while according protection to customers. We also enhanced consumer protection in digital financial services and continued to promote a customer-centric corporate culture.

mt_raw: 在反洗錢及反恐融資（AML/CFT）方面，2019年標誌著金融行動特別工作組（FATF）對香港AML/CFT制度第四輪相互評估工作圓滿完成。評估結果認為，香港的AML/CFT制度整體符合標準且具有效性，特別肯定銀行界對風險的良好掌握，以及香港金融管理局（HKMA）在AML/CFT領域以風險為本的監管工作。HKMA持續參與針對詐騙及洗錢情報共享的公私合作機制，並積極支持銀行界採用AML/CFT監管科技。

src_raw: Banks can affect the stability of the system through the way they carry out their businesses and, in extremis, by failing in a disorderly manner. The Monetary Authority, as a supervisory authority, plays a key role in safeguarding financial stability by ensuring banks are resilient to shocks and are able to recover their positions in response to crises, ultimately helping to prevent failures. The Monetary Authority is responsible for the prudential supervision of banks in Hong Kong. It is tasked with the authorization of licensed banks, restricted licence banks and deposit-taking companies in Hong Kong, which are collectively known as authorized institutions (AIs). The Monetary Authority is also responsible for the designation and oversight of certain financial market infrastructures (FMIs).
mt_raw: 銀行透過其經營方式，甚至在極端情況下通過混亂倒閉，都可能影響體系穩定。作為監管機構，香港金融管理局在確保銀行具備抵禦衝擊的能力，並能在危機中恢復其地位，最終有助於防止破產方面，發揮關鍵作用，以維護金融穩定。香港金融管理局負責對香港銀行進行審慎監理，包括授權設立持牌銀行、受限制牌照銀行和接受存款公司，這些機構統稱為認可機構。金融管理局亦負責指定和監察若干金融市場基礎設施。

terms: {'hkma': '金管局', 'monetary authority': '金融管理專員', 'resolution plan': '處置規劃', 'resolution regime': '處置機制', 'the monetary authority': '金融管理專員', 'ais': '認可機構'}
src_raw: However, the Monetary Authority cannot ensure, nor is the Hong Kong prudential regulatory framework designed to ensure, a zero-risk financial system. Instead, the Monetary Authority, as a resolution authority, seeks to ensure that, in the event of an AI becoming non-viable, its failure can be managed in an orderly manner. To this end, a resolution regime for financial institutions in Hong Kong has been established, under which the Monetary Authority is the resolution authority for AIs. To ensure that the resolution regime in Hong Kong is operational, it is important to lay down resolution legislation and policy standards, undertake resolution planning to remove impediments to AIs’ resolvability and develop the HKMA’s operational capability to resolve a failing AI. In order to carry out these tasks effectively, the HKMA adopts an internationally harmonised and co-ordinated approach.
mt_raw: 然而，金管局無法保證金融體系零風險，亦非香港的審慎監管框架旨在達到此目的。相反，金管局作為處置機構，致力於確保當某間金融機構出現經營困難時，其破產事宜能以有序方式處理。為此，香港已建立金融機構處置機制，金管局在此機制中擔任處置機構。為確保此機制有效運作，制定相關的法律及政策標準、進行處置規劃以消除影響金融機構可處置性的障礙，並提升金管局處理陷入困境金融機構的能力至關重要。為有效執行這些任務，金管局採取與國際接軌且協調一致的處理方式。

src_raw: Apart from off-site activities, the HKMA conducts regular on-site examinations supplemented with thematic reviews on areas assessed to be of higher risk. A total of 405 on-site examinations and thematic reviews were conducted during the year. Credit risk management remained a key focus of these examinations and reviews. Another major focus was in technology risk and operational risk management. The HKMA also increased the number of on-site examinations and thematic reviews targeted at liquidity and market risk management as well as the implementation of the Basel capital adequacy framework. At the same time, specialist teams performed on-site examinations and thematic reviews of AIs’ activities in securities, investment products, insurance and Mandatory provident Fund (MPF)-related businesses.
mt_raw: 除了場外活動外，香港金融管理局還會定期進行現場檢查，並針對被評估為風險較高的領域進行主題審查。本年度共進行了405次現場檢查和主題審查。信貸風險管理仍然是這些檢查和審查的重點。另一個主要關注點是科技風險和營運風險管理。香港金融管理局也增加了針對流動性風險和市場風險管理，以及巴塞爾資本充足率框架實施情況的現場檢查和主題審查數量。與此同時，專業團隊對人工智能在證券、投資產品、保險及強積金業務中的活動進行了現場檢查和主題審查。

src_raw: During the year, the HKMA devoted increased supervisory efforts in ensuring that AIs continued to adopt prudent credit risk management standards amid the uncertain economic environment. Solvency stress tests were enhanced to incorporate more comprehensive risk coverage and more severe stress assumptions. The results of the enhanced stress tests continued to indicate that banks generally had sufficient capital buffers to withstand extreme shocks. Targeted and thematic examinations were conducted to evaluate the credit risk management practices of AIs in different areas, such as lending to corporates engaged in high-risk business, complex financing arrangements, and collateralised lending to private banking and wealth management customers. Recognising that small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) would more likely face greater challenges during economic downturns, the HKMA established a Banking Sector SME Lending Co-ordination Mechanism in October, with a view to encouraging banks to continue to support SMEs’ financing needs to the extent permitted by prudent risk management principles.
mt_raw: 在一年內，香港金融管理局加強了對金融機構的監管力度，以確保其在不確定的經濟環境下持續採用審慎的信貸風險管理標準。償付能力測試已得到強化，涵蓋更全面的風險範疇，並採用更嚴峻的壓力假設。強化後的測試結果持續顯示，銀行普遍擁有充足的資本緩衝，足以應對極端衝擊。為評估金融機構在不同領域的信貸風險管理實務，金管局進行了有針對性的審查，例如針對向從事高風險業務的公司貸款、複雜的融資安排，以及向私人銀行及財富管理客戶提供的擔保貸款等。鑒於中小企業（SMEs）在經濟下行期間更可能面臨挑戰，香港金融管理局於十月設立了銀行業中小企業貸款協調機制，旨在鼓勵銀行在審慎風險管理原則下，持續支持中小企業的融資需求。

terms: {'chart 1': '圖1', 'hkma': '金管局', 'countercyclical macro - prudential measure': '逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施', 'property market': '物業市場', 'debt servicing ratio': '供款與入息比率', 'dsr': '供款與入息比率'}
src_raw: The resilience of the Hong Kong banking sector to withstand a downturn in the property market has been strengthened significantly by the eight rounds of countercyclical macro-prudential measures introduced by the HKMA since 2009. The average loan-to-value (LTV) ratio of new residential mortgage loans fell to 53% in December 2019 from 64% in September 2009, before the countercyclical measures were first introduced. The average debt servicing ratio (DSR) of new mortgages also decreased to 36% in December 2019 from 41% in August 2010, when a cap on DSR was first applied (Chart 1).
mt_raw: 自2009年起，香港金融管理局（HKMA）推出的八輪逆周期宏觀審慎措施，顯著增強了香港銀行業抵禦樓市下行風險的韌性。在首次推出逆周期措施之前，即2009年9月，新住宅按揭貸款的平均貸款價值比率（LTV）為64%，至2019年12月已降至53%。新按揭貸款的平均債務償還比率（DSR）亦由2010年8月首次實施DSR上限時的41%，降至2019年12月的36%（圖1）。

src_raw: The HKMA adopts a three-phased approach to implement the Cyber Resilience Assessment Framework under the Cybersecurity Fortification Initiative (CFI). phase One assessment, involving all the major banks, was completed in 2018. The remaining AIs covered in the second and third phases have substantially completed the assessment as scheduled. The HKMA has also embarked on a comprehensive review of the CFI to fine-tune the initiative given the experience gained in the past years.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局（HKMA）採用三階段方法來實施「網絡安全強化計劃」（CFI）下的「網絡韌性評估架構」。第一階段的評估涵蓋所有主要銀行，於2018年完成。第二及第三階段所涵蓋的其他機構已按計劃大致完成評估。香港金融管理局亦已開始對CFI進行全面檢討，以根據過去幾年的經驗進一步優化該計劃。

src_raw: In October, the HKMA issued a revised Supervisory Policy Manual (SPM) module on “Risk Management of E-banking”. The revision sought to provide the industry with greater flexibility to meet changing customer expectations on electronic banking services. The HKMA also published a set of high-level principles on the use of artificial intelligence in order to provide guidance for the industry.
mt_raw: 十月，香港金融管理局發佈了經修訂的《監理政策手冊》中關於「電子銀行風險管理」的章節。 修訂旨在為業界提供更大的彈性，以滿足客戶對電子銀行服務不斷變化的期望。 金融管理局亦同時發佈了一系列關於人工智能應用的高層原則，以供業界參考。

terms: {'hkma': '金管局', 'banking industry': '銀行業界', 'banking system': '銀行體系', 'automated teller machine': '自動櫃員機', 'atm': '自動櫃員機'}
src_raw: Since the social events started in June, the HKMA have maintained close dialogue with the industry to monitor the impact on banking operations and services. Banks were requested to replenish automated teller machines (ATMs) more frequently and repair vandalised facilities as soon as practicable. The HKMA also acted quickly to refute malicious rumours that sought to undermine the public’s confidence in the banking system. Thanks to concerted efforts by the banking industry, the affected bank branches and facilities quickly resumed normal services and the inconvenience caused to the public was kept to a minimum. In view of the rising operational risk posed by the social events, banks were asked to take additional precautionary measures to strengthen their operational resilience.
mt_raw: 自六月社會事件開始以來，香港金融管理局一直與業界保持緊密溝通，監察對銀行營運及服務的影響。銀行被要求更頻繁地補充自動櫃員機（ATM）並盡快修復遭破壞的設施。香港金融管理局亦迅速行動，反駁旨在削弱公眾對銀行體系信心的惡意謠言。由於銀行業界協同努力，受影響的銀行分行及設施已迅速恢復正常運作，並盡量減少了對公眾造成的不便。考慮到社會事件所帶來的營運風險不斷上升，銀行被要求採取額外預防措施，以加強其營運韌性。

src_raw: The HKMA carries out risk-based supervision of AIs’ AML/CFT systems. During the year, 18 on-site examinations and 61 off-site reviews were conducted, including targeted thematic reviews on private banking and the governance of the use of new technology. mt_raw: 香港金融管理局對持牌機構的反洗錢／反恐融資系統進行基於風險的監管。本年度共進行了18次現場檢查及61次非現場審閱，其中包括針對私人銀行業務及新技術應用治理的主題性審閱。香港金融管理局與業界分享了主題性審閱的觀察結果及最佳做法，該審閱涵蓋持牌機構應用基於風險的洗錢及恐怖主義融資控制措施的情況，旨在協助持牌機構採用適當的開戶程序及為中小企業提供服務。

src_raw: A highlight of 2019 for the HKMA and Hong Kong’s overall AML/CFT regime was the publication of the FATF ME Report on Hong Kong in September. The Report represents one of the best overall results to date in the FATF’s fourth-round ME of its member jurisdictions. Hong Kong scored six “Substantial” ratings out of 11 “Immediate Outcomes” in the assessment of the effectiveness of its AML/CFT regime, and a high mark for the technical compliance aspect of the ME.
mt_raw: 2019年對香港金融管理局（HKMA）及香港整體的反洗錢／反恐融资（AML/CFT）制度而言，重點是9月發布的金融行動特別工作組（FATF）互評報告。該報告代表FATF對其成員司法管轄區進行第四輪互評至今最優秀的整體成果之一。在評估香港AML/CFT制度有效性時，香港在11項「即時成果」中獲得六項「實質性」評分，並在互評的技術合規方面也取得高分。

src_raw: The Report favourably assessed the HKMA’s risk-based approach to AML/CFT supervision, noting that the HKMA had a good understanding of ML/TF risks in the banking sector and a reasonable understanding of risks in the stored value facility (SVF) sector. The Report also positively assessed the collective AML/CFT efforts of the banking sector, such as the increased use of data analytics by larger AIs, the fact that the great majority of suspicious transaction reports were filed by AIs, and the sector’s proactive participation in the Fraud and Money Laundering Intelligence Taskforce (FMLIT).
mt_raw: 報告對香港金融管理局（金管局）以風險為本的洗錢及恐怖融資（AML/CFT）監管方法給予肯定評價，指出金管局對銀行業的洗錢及恐怖融資風險有良好的理解，並且對儲值設施（SVF）業的風險也有合理的認識。報告亦對銀行業的整體AML/CFT工作表現出正面評價，例如大型牌照持有人（AI）越來越多地使用數據分析，絕大多數的可疑交易報告均由AI提交，以及該行業積極參與欺詐及洗錢情報工作小組（FMLIT）。

src_raw: Hong Kong plays an indispensable role in facilitating international investors’ allocation of renminbi assets, with its unparalleled access to the onshore markets through the Stock Connect and Bond Connect schemes. This was evident by the tripling of the number of registered investors and daily turnover under Bond Connect over the past year. Further enhancements have been introduced to both Bond Connect and Stock Connect, providing more convenience and flexibility for international investors to invest in onshore securities in the Mainland. The HKMA also worked closely with Mainland authorities to explore and implement a series of financial facilitation measures for Hong Kong residents to access financial and banking services across the border in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area (GBA), including a prospective, two-way wealth management connect scheme. Hong Kong maintains a firm foothold as the global hub for offshore renminbi business. According to the Bank for International Settlements (BIS) Triennial Survey of Foreign Exchange (FX) and Derivatives Market Turnover, Hong Kong continued to be the largest offshore renminbi FX centre in the world.
mt_raw: 香港在促進國際投資者配置人民幣資產方面扮演著不可或缺的角色，其透過「滬港通」及「債券通」機制，享有通往內地市場無與倫比的便捷通道。過去一年，「債券通」的註冊投資者數量及每日成交額均增長三倍，充分體現了這一點。為提升國際投資者投資內地證券的便利性及靈活性，「滬港通」及「債券通」亦已進一步優化。香港金融管理局亦與內地當局緊密合作，探討並推行一系列金融便利措施，讓香港居民能夠更便捷地在粵港澳大灣區跨境使用金融及銀行服務，其中包括一項具前景的雙向財富管理「通」計畫。香港持續穩居全球離岸人民幣業務的樞紐地位。根據國際清算銀行（BIS）三年一度的外匯及衍生工具市場成交量調查，香港仍然是全球最大的離岸人民幣外匯中心。

src_raw: Continuous efforts were put into opening up new opportunities to further enhance the competitiveness of Hong Kong’s financial platform. To promote the development of the fund business in Hong Kong, the HKMA worked closely with the Government and industry to provide a more favourable tax and regulatory environment for fund formation. A number of large-scale events and targeted outreach activities were organised to promote Hong Kong as a hub for green finance, infrastructure investment and financing and corporate treasury centres (CTCs). In an effort to enhance Hong Kong’s soft power, the Hong Kong Academy of Finance (AoF) was set up in June to develop financial leadership and promote research collaboration.
mt_raw: 為提升香港金融平台的競爭力，我們持續開拓新領域，並積極拓展相關機會。為促進香港基金業務發展，香港金融管理局（金管局）與政府及業界緊密合作，致力為基金設立提供更優惠的稅務及監管環境。為推廣香港作為綠色金融、基礎設施投資及融資，以及企業財務中心（CTCs）的樞紐，我們亦舉辦一系列大型活動及有針對性的推廣活動。為加強香港的軟實力，香港金融學院（AoF）於六月成立，旨在培育金融領導人才並促進研究合作。

src_raw: In the central banking and regulatory community, the HKMA plays a leadership role in a number of regional and international committees. The HKMA chaired the Standing Committee on Supervisory and Regulatory Cooperation (SRC) of the Financial Stability Board (FSB) until 31 August 2019. Currently, the HKMA is chairing the Supervision and Implementation Group (SIG) of the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision (Basel Committee), and the Working Group on Financial Markets (WGFM) established under the Executives’ Meeting of East Asia-Pacific Central Banks (EMEAP). The HKMA is also co-chairing the Non-Bank Monitoring Experts Group (NMEG) of the FSB with the US Securities and Exchange Commission.
mt_raw: 在中央銀行和監管界，香港金管局在多個地區和國際委員會中扮演領導角色。香港金管局曾於2019年8月31日之前擔任金融穩定理事會（FSB）常設監管合作與合作委員會（SRC）的主席。目前，香港金管局正擔任巴塞爾銀行監督委員會（巴塞爾委員會）的監督與實施工作小組（SIG）的主席，以及亞太地區中央銀行行長會議（EMEAP）下設立的金融市場工作小組（WGFM）的主席。此外，香港金管局還與美國證券交易委員會共同擔任金融穩定理事會（FSB）的非銀行監測專家小組（NMEG）的共同主席。

src_raw: The safe and efficient operation of Hong Kong’s financial infrastructure lays a solid foundation for Hong Kong’s role as an international financial centre. The four interbank Real Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) systems, the Central Moneymarkets Unit (CMU) and the Hong Kong Trade Repository (HKTR) achieved 100% system availability in 2019, beating the target of 99.95%. Through its accounts set up with the two Mainland central securities depositories, the CMU facilitates the settlement of transactions conducted under Bond Connect Northbound Trading and the holding of Mainland debt securities on behalf of relevant CMU members.
mt_raw: 香港金融基礎設施的安全高效運作，為香港作為國際金融中心的地位奠定了堅實基礎。2019年，四個銀行間即時全額結算系統（RTGS）、中央貨幣市場單位（CMU）及香港交易存管處（HKTR）均實現100%系統可用率，超越99.95%的目標。CMU透過在兩家內地中央證券存管機構開設的賬戶，協助完成債券通北向交易的結算，並為相關CMU成員代為持有內地債務證券。

src_raw: The FPS, which serves as an extension of Hong Kong dollar RTGS system to enable the public to make instant retail fund transfers and payments across different banks and stored value facilities (SVFs) on a round-the-clock basis, ran smoothly in its first year of operation. Users’ adoption of the facility had increased steadily, as manifested in the four million registrations and tripling of transaction volumes by the end of 2019. The FPS brings new opportunities to the retail payment industry and promotes fintech innovation.
mt_raw: 作為香港美元實時結算系統的延伸，FPS 讓公眾可全天候透過不同銀行及儲值支付工具（SVF）進行即時零售資金轉帳及付款，其運作在營運第一年表現順利。用戶對該系統的採用情況持續上升，截至2019年底，已累計四百萬用戶登記，交易量更增加三倍。FPS 為零售支付行業帶來新機遇，並推動金融科技創新。

src_raw: To ensure the general safety and efficiency of the local retail payment industry, the HKMA has designated and is overseeing a total of six retail payment systems (RPSs) under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance (PSSVFO). The HKMA also issued two new SVF licences in May, bringing the total number of SVF licensees to 18. SVF licensees continued to launch new products and services actively during the year to diversify customer choices and enhance user experience.
mt_raw: 為確保本地零售支付行業的整體安全及效率，香港金融管理局（HKMA）根據《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》（PSSVFO）監管共六個零售支付系統（RPS）。香港金融管理局亦於五月份發出兩張新的儲值支付工具牌照，使牌照持有人數增至18間。全年內，儲值支付工具牌照持有人持續積極推出新產品及服務，以拓展客戶選擇及提升用戶體驗。

src_raw: The seven Smart Banking initiatives were announced by the HKMA in September 2017 with the aim of helping the banking sector achieve higher standards of operation and embrace the enormous opportunities brought about by the convergence of banking and technology. During the year, considerable progress was made in implementing these initiatives and transforming the fintech ecosystem of Hong Kong.

terms: {'svfs': '儲值支付工具', 'financial infrastructure': '金融基建', 'infrastructure': '基建', 'fps': '快速支付系統「轉數快」', 'svf': '儲值支付工具'}
src_raw: The launch of the FPS in September 2018 was a major milestone in the financial infrastructure development of Hong Kong in the digital era. The FPS further promotes the adoption of e-payment in Hong Kong by providing efficient and convenient payment services to the general public and corporates. Since the launch of the FPS, the number of participating service providers had increased to 30 banks and 11 SVFs, with the addition of nine banks and one SVF, by the end of 2019.
mt_raw: 二零一八年九月「快速支付系統」（FPS）正式推出，是香港金融基礎設施在數碼時代發展的一個重要里程碑。快速支付系統進一步促進香港電子支付的普及，為公眾及企業提供高效便捷的支付服務。自快速支付系統推出以來，參與服務供應商的數量已增至三十間銀行及十一間支付系統運營商（SVF），至二零一九年底，再增加九間銀行及一間支付系統運營商。
alg_terms: {'svfs': '支付', 'financial infrastructure': '金融 設施', 'infrastructure': '設施', 'fps': '快速支付系統', 'svf': '支付'}
norm_tgt_terms: ['支付', '金融 設施', '設施', '快速支付系統', '支付']

terms: {'chart 1': '圖1', 'fps': '快速支付系統「轉數快」'}
src_raw: Usage of the FPS has also grown steadily. As of 31 December 2019, the FPS recorded four million registrations (Chart 1) and processed 44 million transactions involving an aggregate amount of HK$748.5 billion and RMB17 billion. In December 2019, average daily turnover reached 168,000 transactions worth HK$2.4 billion and RMB38 million (Chart 2), as compared with 51,000 transactions during its first full month of operation in October 2018.
mt_raw: FPS 的使用量亦持續穩步增長。截至 2019 年 12 月 31 日，FPS 累計註冊用戶達四百萬名（圖 1），並處理了涉及總金額港幣 7485 億元及人民幣 170 億元的 44,000 萬筆交易。2019 年 12 月，平均每日交易量達 168,000 笔，總值港幣 24 億元及人民幣 3800 萬元（圖 2），較其於 2018 年 10 月首個完整營運月的 51,000 笔交易為高。

src_raw: The HKMA works with the industry to extend FPS usage from person-to-person payments to bill payments and other merchant payments. For example, enhancements were made to enable merchants to use a variety of proxy identifiers and accept partial or over-payments via a QR code. A technical specification was developed to facilitate the invocation of a mobile banking or SVF e-wallet mobile application (app) from a business mobile app for FPS payment. This would greatly improve customer experience in making merchant and business payments via the FPS using mobile devices.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局與業界合作，將快速支付系統的應用範圍從個人對個人付款擴展至帳單付款及其他商戶付款。例如，已作出改進，使商戶可使用多種代理識別碼，並透過QR碼接受部分或超額付款。為簡化從商戶手機應用程式啟動行動銀行或SVF電子錢包手機應用程式（應用程式）進行快速支付系統付款的流程，已開發了一項技術規範。這將大幅提升客戶透過行動設備使用快速支付系統進行商戶及企業付款的體驗。

norm_tgt_terms: ['香港金融管理局', '快速支付系統', 'SVF']

terms: {'hkma': '金管局', 'inland revenue department': '稅務局', 'rating and valuation department': '差餉物業估價署', 'water supplies department': '水務署', 'fps': '快速支付系統「轉數快」', 'svf': '儲值支付工具'}
src_raw: The HKMA also works closely with relevant Government departments to assist them in using the FPS to accept bill payments from the public. From 1 November, bills issued by the Inland Revenue Department, the Rating and Valuation Department and the Water Supplies Department were printed with an FPS QR code so that the public could scan the QR code easily with supporting mobile banking or SVF e-wallet apps to make payment. The HKMA will continue working with various Government departments and public bodies to explore other potential use cases which can make it convenient for the public to make payment via the FPS.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局亦與相關政府部門緊密合作，協助他們利用快速支付系統收取公眾繳費。由11月1日起，稅務局、評估及物業評定署和水務署發出的繳費單均印有快速支付系統二維碼，方便公眾使用支援的流動銀行或SVF電子錢包應用程式掃描二維碼以進行繳費。香港金融管理局將繼續與各政府部門和公共機構合作，探索其他潛在應用，以方便公眾透過快速支付系統繳費。

src_raw: To raise public awareness of the FPS, the HKMA has developed a new series of education and publicity materials, such as Announcements in the public Interest for broadcast on television and radio, as well as videos and electronic banners for digital platforms. The HKMA also participated in trade fairs to promote the FPS to small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and corporates. Various FPS participating banks and SVFs launched promotion campaigns and offered incentives to encourage customers to register with the FPS and to use it for fund transfer and bill payment.
mt_raw: 為提高公眾對FPS的認識，香港金融管理局（HKMA）研發了一系列教育及宣傳材料，例如以公眾利益為宗旨的電視及電台廣播公告，以及適用於數字平台的視頻和電子橫幅。香港金融管理局亦參與展覽會，向中小企業及企業推廣FPS。多間參與FPS的銀行及SVF亦發起了推廣活動，並提供激勵措施，鼓勵客戶註冊使用FPS，以進行資金轉帳及繳付賬單。

src_raw: The HKMA continued to facilitate the banking sector’s development and adoption of Open API in accordance with the four-phase approach of the Open API Framework. Under phase I, 20 retail banks opened up over 500 Open API endpoints in January, covering information of banking products and services. Under phase II, the banks opened up in October over 300 APIs to support applications for banking products and services.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局（HKMA）繼續按照「開放API架構」的四階段方法，推動銀行業發展和採用開放API。在第一階段，20間零售銀行於1月開放超過500個開放API端點，涵蓋銀行產品及服務的資訊。在第二階段，銀行於10月開放超過300個API，以支援銀行產品及服務的應用程式。

src_raw: On trade finance, a proof-of-concept (PoC) study on linking up eTradeConnect and we.trade was completed in the first quarter of the year. In November, a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) was signed between the subsidiaries of Hong Kong Interbank Clearing Limited and the Institute of Digital Currency of the People’s Bank of China (PBoC) to conduct a PoC study on linking up eTradeConnect and the PBoC Trade Finance platform to provide firms in both Hong Kong and Mainland China with more convenient trade finance services.
mt_raw: 在貿易融資方面，今年第一季已完成有關連接eTradeConnect與we.trade的概念驗證（PoC）研究。11月，香港銀行間清算有限公司的子公司與中國人民銀行數字貨幣研究所（PBoC）簽署備忘錄（MoU），將開展概念驗證（PoC）研究，以連接eTradeConnect與中國人民銀行貿易融資平台，為香港和中國內地的企業提供更便捷的貿易融資服務。

src_raw: Global financial markets performed better than expected in 2019 as the effect of accommodative monetary policies from major central banks outweighed concerns about the global growth slowdown and US-China trade tensions. Global equity markets rebounded following a significant correction in the fourth quarter of 2018, while major government bond yields declined and bond prices went up. Under such a favourable environment, the Exchange Fund recorded an investment income of HK$262.2 billion in 2019, representing an investment return of 6.6%.
mt_raw: 2019年全球金融市場表現優於預期，因主要央行的寬鬆貨幣政策效果超越了對全球增長放緩及中美貿易緊張關係的擔憂。全球股市在2018年第四季大幅回調後出現反彈，同時主要政府債券收益率下降，債券價格上漲。在這樣有利的環境下，金管局投資基金在2019年錄得投資收入達2622億港元，投資回報率為6.6%。

src_raw: The Exchange Fund’s primary objective, as laid down in the Exchange Fund Ordinance, is to affect, either directly or indirectly, the exchange value of the currency of Hong Kong. The Fund may also be used to maintain the stability and integrity of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial systems to help maintain Hong Kong as an international financial centre. The HKMA, under the delegated authority of the Financial Secretary (FS) and within the terms of the delegation, is responsible to the FS for the use and investment management of the Exchange Fund.
mt_raw: 根據《外匯基金條例》的規定，外匯基金的主要目標是直接或間接影響香港貨幣的匯價。基金亦可用於維持香港貨幣及金融體系的穩定和健全，以協助鞏固香港國際金融中心的地位。香港金融管理局根據財政司司長授予的權力，並在授權範圍內，就外匯基金的運用及投資管理向財政司司長負責。

src_raw: Broadly speaking, the Exchange Fund has two major portfolios: the Backing Portfolio (BP) and the Investment Portfolio (IP). The BP holds highly liquid US dollar-denominated assets to provide full backing to the Monetary Base as required under Currency Board arrangements. The IP invests primarily in the bond and equity markets of the member countries of the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development to preserve the value and long-term purchasing power of its assets.
mt_raw: 廣義而言，儲備基金擁有兩個主要投資組合：擔保組合（BP）和投資組合（IP）。BP持有高流動性的美元資產，以根據貨幣局制度的要求，為貨幣基礎提供充分擔保。IP則主要投資於經濟合作與發展組織成員國的債券和股票市場，以維護其資產的價值和長期購買力。

src_raw: To better manage risks and enhance returns in the medium and long term, the HKMA diversifies part of the Exchange Fund’s investments in a prudent and incremental manner into a wider variety of asset classes. This includes emerging market and Mainland bonds and equities, private equity (including infrastructure), and real estate. Emerging market and Mainland bonds and equities are held under the IP, while private equity and real estate investments are held under the Long-Term Growth Portfolio (LTGP). The cap for the market value of investments under the LTGP is set at the aggregate of one-third of the accumulated surplus of the Exchange Fund and the portion of the Future Fund and placements by subsidiaries of the Exchange Fund linked to the LTGP.
mt_raw: 為更好地管理風險並提升中長期回報，香港金融管理局（HKMA）會以審慎且循序漸進的方式，將部分外匯基金的投資分散至更廣泛的資產類別，包括新興市場及內地債券和股票、私募股權（包括基礎設施）以及房地產。新興市場及內地債券和股票由投資組合（IP）持有，而私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長投資組合（LTGP）持有。LTGP下投資的市值上限，訂定為外匯基金累計盈餘的三分之一總額，並加上與LTGP相關的未來基金及香港金融管理局附屬機構的投資總額。

The interest rate is generally linked to the performance of the IP, with the major exception of the Future Fund, which links its interest rate to both the IP and the LTGP with reference to the portfolio mix. As at the end of 2019, the portfolio mix of the Future Fund between the IP and the LTGP was about 40:60.

src_raw: The investment process of the Exchange Fund is underpinned by decisions on two types of asset allocation: the strategic asset allocation and the tactical asset allocation. The strategic asset allocation, reflected in the investment benchmark, represents long-term asset allocation given the investment objectives of the Exchange Fund. Guided by the strategic allocation, assets are tactically allocated in an attempt to achieve an excess return over the benchmark. This means the actual allocation is often different from the benchmark (or strategic) allocation. The differences between the actual and benchmark allocations are known as “tactical deviations”. While the benchmark and tracking error limit are determined by the FS in consultation with the EFAC, tactical decisions and allowable ranges for tactical deviations are made and set by the HKMA under delegated authority. Within the ranges allowed for tactical deviations, portfolio managers may assume positions to take advantage of short-term market movements.
mt_raw: 交易所基金的投資過程基於兩種資產配置的決定：戰略性資產配置和戰術性資產配置。戰略性資產配置反映在投資基准中，代表基於交易所基金投資目標的長期資產配置。在戰略配置的指導下，資產進行戰術性配置，以期實現超過投資基准的超額回報。這意味著實際配置往往與投資基准（或戰略性）配置不同。實際配置與投資基准配置之間的差異稱為「戰術性偏差」。而投資基准及追蹤誤差上限由財政司與交易所基金顧問委員會磋商後確定，而戰術性決策及戰術性偏差的允許範圍則由香港金融管理局在授權範圍內制定。在戰術性偏差允許的範圍內，資產組合經理可建立頭寸，以利用短期市場波動。

terms: {'bp': '支持組合', 'efio': '外匯基金投資辦公室', 'exchange fund': '外匯基金', 'exchange fund investment office': '外匯基金投資辦公室', 'hkma': '金管局', 'ip': '投資組合', 'macro risk management strategy': '宏觀風險管理策略'}
src_raw: The HKMA set up the Exchange Fund Investment Office (EFIO) in August 2018 to house its investment and related risk management functions. Staff members of the EFIO directly manage about 71% of the investments of the Exchange Fund, comprising the entire BP and part of the IP. This part of the IP includes a set of portfolios invested in global fixed-income markets and various derivative overlay portfolios implementing macro risk management strategies for the Fund.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局於二零一八年八月成立外匯基金投資事務處（EFIO），集中其投資及相關風險管理職能。外匯基金投資事務處的職員直接管理外匯基金約百分之七十一的投資，包括全部的本金部分及部分投資組合。這部分投資組合包括投資於全球固定收益市場的一系列投資組合，以及實施基金宏觀風險管理策略的各項衍生工具投資組合。

The purpose of engaging external managers is to tap the best investment expertise available in the market to realise sustainable returns, draw on diverse and complementary investment styles, and gain their market insights and technical expertise in investment.

src_raw: The growing complexity of the investment environment underlines the importance of risk management. Stringent controls and investment guidelines are in place for both internally and externally managed portfolios, and compliance with guidelines and regulations is closely monitored. As the investment environment has become more complex, risk assessment has been strengthened to support the Exchange Fund’s increased level of investment diversification. Risk-control tools are deployed to assess market risks under both normal and adverse market conditions. Detailed performance attribution analyses are also conducted to identify sources of performance, enabling the HKMA to assess how to make the best use of the investment skills of both internal and external managers.
mt_raw: 投資環境日益複雜，更凸顯風險管理的重要性。無論是內部或外部管理的投資組合，均已建立嚴格的控制和投資指引，並對其遵守情況及法規進行密切監察。隨著投資環境變得更加複雜，風險評估已得到加強，以支持外匯基金投資組合多元化的程度提高。我們運用風險控制工具，評估在正常及不利市場情況下的市場風險。此外，我們還會進行詳細的績效歸因分析，以確定績效來源，從而協助金管局評估如何最佳地運用內部及外部經理的投資技能。

src_raw: In terms of public market investments, the HKMA implements both process-related and investment-related measures. One process-related measure taken by the HKMA is the adoption of the Principles of Responsible Ownership (PRO) issued by the Securities and Futures Commission in 2016, which help investors determine how best to meet their ownership responsibilities in relation to their investments in Hong Kong-listed companies. In managing the Exchange Fund, the HKMA has developed internal guidelines on ESG factors covering the process of selection, appointment and monitoring of external fund managers. The appointed external fund managers for the HKMA’s Hong Kong equities and Mainland active equities portfolios are required to adhere to the pRO in managing the investments on a “comply-or-explain” basis, and external fund managers appointed to manage the HKMA’s portfolios in developed market equities need to adhere to internationally recognised ESG standards. Apart from externally managed funds, ESG factors are also incorporated into the credit risk analysis of the HKMA’s internally managed bond investment.
mt_raw: 就公開市場投資而言，金管局實施程序性和投資相關的措施。金管局採取的其中一項程序性措施是採用證券及期貨事務監察委員會於2016年發佈的《責任投資原則》（PRO），協助投資者確定在對香港上市公司的投資中，如何最好地履行其所有者責任。在管理外匯基金方面，金管局已制定內部指引，涵蓋外部基金經理的選擇、委任和監察過程中的環境、社會和管治（ESG）因素。獲委任管理金管局香港股票及內地主動股票投資組合的外部基金經理，被要求在投資管理上遵循《責任投資原則》，並採取「遵守或解釋」原則；而委任管理金管局發達市場股票投資組合的外部基金經理則需遵守國際公認的ESG標準。除了外部管理的基金外，ESG因素亦被納入金管局內部管理的債券投資的信用風險分析中。

src_raw: As for ESG investments in the public market, the HKMA has invested in green bonds since 2015 as one of the early investors in this market, and participates in the Managed Co-Lending Portfolio Programme, which is run by the International Finance Corporation with a focus on sustainable investments across emerging markets. Going forward, the HKMA will continue to grow its green bond portfolio by either direct investment or investing in green bond funds. The HKMA also plans to construct ESGthemed mandates in equities investment by adopting an ESG equities index as a benchmark for passive portfolios and engaging active equities managers who apply ESG factors in their investment decisions.
mt_raw: 至於公開市場的ESG投資，香港金融管理局自2015年起即為綠色債券的早期投資者之一，並參與國際金融公司主辦的共同貸款投資組合計劃，該計劃專注於新興市場的可持續投資。未來，香港金融管理局將繼續透過直接投資或投資綠色債券基金等方式擴充綠色債券投資組合。此外，香港金融管理局計劃在股票投資中構建ESG主題的投資策略，採用ESG股票指數作為被動投資組合的基準，並與在投資決策中應用ESG因素的主動股票經理合作。
