src_raw: With respect to private market investments, the HKMA examines the ESG policies and practices of general partners as part of its due diligence process. In particular, ESG risk evaluation is conducted as a mandatory part of due diligence in all LTGP investments. For the LTGP, the HKMA invests in projects with sustainable features; for instance, the HKMA has invested in renewables since 2013 in direct and co-investments in the energy sector, as well as green buildings and warehouses with green and sustainable features in its real estate portfolio. Going forward, the HKMA will continue to source projects with sustainable features and include green accreditation as a predominant factor in real estate investment.
mt_raw: 關於私募市場投資，香港金融管理局（HKMA）會在其盡職調查過程中審視普通合夥人的環境、社會及治理（ESG）政策與實踐。特別是在所有長期一般合夥人（LTGP）投資中，ESG風險評估已作為盡職調查的必備環節。針對LTGP，HKMA投資具可持續特徵的項目；例如，自2013年起，HKMA已在能源領域進行直接及共同投資，投資可再生能源，並在其房地產組合中投資具綠色及可持續特徵的綠色建築及倉庫。展望未來，HKMA將持續尋找具可持續特徵的項目，並將綠色認證作為房地產投資的主要考量因素。

src_raw: The HKMA will monitor the development of ESG standards closely and assess how these standards can be further integrated into its investment process. The process is facilitated by its collaboration with like-minded investors and relevant international organisations. In particular, being a signatory of the UN-supported principles for Responsible Investment, which is the world’s leading proponent of RI, the HKMA expects to participate in the formulation of ESG best practices and to motivate other investors in adopting RI. Besides, the HKMA is also a member of FCLTGlobal, a not-for-profit organisation that works to encourage a longer-term focus in business and investment decision-making through workshops and research studies. In 2019, the HKMA also became a supporter of the Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局（HKMA）將密切監測環境、社會及管治（ESG）標準的發展，並評估這些標準如何進一步融入其投資流程。為此，金管局將與理念相近的投資者及相關國際組織緊密合作。作為聯合國支持的《責任投資原則》的簽署方，金管局期望參與制定ESG最佳實踐，並鼓勵其他投資者採納責任投資。此外，金管局亦是FCLTGlobal的成員，該組織致力於透過研討會及研究，促進企業及投資決策的長期導向。2019年，金管局更成為氣候相關財務披露工作小組的支持機構。

src_raw: Despite concerns about the global growth slowdown and US-China trade tensions, global financial markets performed well in 2019 on the back of accommodative monetary policies from major central banks. Following a significant correction in the fourth quarter of 2018, global equity markets rallied in 2019. In the bond markets, major government bond yields declined markedly while bond prices went up in the first three quarters of 2019 as a result of monetary easing. Although bond prices retreated in the fourth quarter amid a slight rebound in yields, the overall gains in the bond markets were still satisfactory in 2019.
mt_raw: 儘管存在對全球經濟增長放緩及中美貿易緊張局勢的擔憂，2019年全球金融市場在主要央行寬鬆貨幣政策的支撐下表現良好。繼2018年第四季度出現顯著回調後，全球股市在2019年強勁反彈。在債券市場方面，主要國家政府債券收益率在2019年前三個季度顯著下降，債券價格則因貨幣政策放鬆而上漲。儘管第四季度債券價格在收益率小幅回升的背景下有所回落，但整體而言，2019年債券市場的表現仍屬令人滿意。

src_raw: In the currency markets, major currencies performed differently against the US dollar. After declining by 3.8% in the third quarter due to an escalation of US-China trade tensions, the renminbi recovered part of its earlier losses in the fourth quarter given easing trade tensions. Overall, the renminbi depreciated by 1.4% against the US dollar. While the pound fell by 3.2% in the third quarter due to the heightened risk of a no-deal Brexit, it had since rebounded significantly as more clarity on Brexit emerged in the fourth quarter, eventually gaining 4.0% against the US dollar.
mt_raw: 在外匯市場中，主要貨幣對美元的表現各異。 由於美中貿易緊張局勢升級，人民幣在第三季度下跌了 3.8%，但在第四季度隨著貿易緊張局勢緩和，部分收復了前期跌幅。 總體而言，人民幣對美元貶值了 1.4%。 由於脫歐無協議的風險增加，英鎊在第三季度下跌了 3.2%，但隨著第四季度脫歐局勢更加明朗，其後顯著反彈，最終對美元升值了 4.0%。

src_raw: Since July 2018, the HKMA has launched various social media channels to strengthen public education and communication. Five social media channels are currently in operation: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter and YouTube, reaching out to a total of over 45,000 followers as at end-December 2019. Amid the social incidents in the second half of 2019, the HKMA made use of social media to rebut unfounded rumours regarding banking operations and financial stability, a move which proved to be highly effective in disseminating facts and preventing the rumours from spreading further.
mt_raw: 自2018年7月起，香港金融管理局（HKMA）已啟動多個社交媒體渠道，以加強公眾教育及溝通。目前運作中的社交媒體渠道共有五個，分別為Facebook、Instagram、LinkedIn、Twitter及YouTube，截至2019年底，總共擁有超過45,000名追蹤者。在2019年下半年的社會事件期間，香港金融管理局利用社交媒體反駁有關銀行運作及金融穩定的不實傳言，此舉在傳播事實及防止傳言進一步擴散方面成效顯著。

src_raw: Apart from the HKMA Annual Report, in 2019 the HKMA published two issues of the Half-Yearly Monetary and Financial Stability Report, four issues of the Quarterly Bulletin, and regular updates of the Monthly Statistical Bulletin to provide up-to-date and thematic information and analyses on monetary, banking and economic issues in Hong Kong. In addition, the HKMA published 19 inSight articles, covering various topics related to its work. The inSight articles provide a useful channel for the HKMA to elucidate the rationale behind its major new initiatives or policies, and provide timely response to topical issues which are of interest to the public.
mt_raw: 除《香港金融管理局年度報告》外，香港金融管理局於2019年亦發表了兩期《半年度貨幣與金融穩定報告》、四期《季度通訊》，以及定期更新《月度統計公報》，以提供香港貨幣、銀行及經濟議題的最新及主題性資訊與分析。此外，香港金融管理局亦發表了19篇inSight專欄文章，涵蓋與其工作相關的多個主題。inSight專欄文章為香港金融管理局提供了一個有用的渠道，用以闡明其重大新措施或政策的理據，並及時回應公眾關注的時事議題。

src_raw: The HKMA official website (www.hkma.gov.hk) presents more than 40,000 pages of content in English and traditional and simplified Chinese, and is the public access gateway to up-to-date information about the HKMA. It also contains the register of authorized institutions (AIs) and local representative offices and the register of the securities staff of AIs, both maintained under section 20 of the Banking Ordinance, as well as the register of stored value facility (SVF) licensees under the payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance. The HKMA official website underwent a major revamp and was relaunched in September with a new design layout, enriched content, an enhanced navigation structure, and more convenient search functions. The revamped website enables users to search information more easily and conveniently based on their own preferences. In particular, the revamped website carries a new section on “Smart Consumers”, where the public can find useful information and smart tips on a wide range of banking and related products or services. This is in line with the HKMA’s long-standing efforts to promote “smart and responsible” use of banking services.
mt_raw: 香港金管局官方網站（www.hkma.gov.hk）提供超過四萬頁的內容，分別以英文、繁體中文及簡體中文呈現，是公眾獲取金管局最新資訊的主要途徑。網站載有根據《銀行業條例》第20條規定的認可機構（「認可機構」）及本地代表辦事處的登記冊，以及認可機構證券人員的登記冊，還有根據《支付系統及儲值設施條例》維持的儲值設施（「儲值設施」）持牌人登記冊。金管局官方網站已於九月完成翻新並重新推出，採用全新設計佈局、更豐富的內容、更完善的導航結構及更便捷的搜尋功能。翻新後的網站讓用戶能更輕鬆地根據個人喜好搜尋資訊。特別是，網站新增了「精明理財」專區，公眾可以在此找到有關銀行及相關產品或服務的有用資訊和貼士。此舉符合金管局長期以來推廣「精明及負責任」使用銀行服務的目標。

src_raw: To reach out to the community and raise public awareness of the HKMA’s work, the HKMA organised a public education seminar for over 400 secondary school students and teachers in 2019. mt_raw: 為加強與社區的聯繫，並提高公眾對香港金融管理局（HKMA）工作的認識，HKMA 於 2019 年舉辦了一場公眾教育研討會，逾 400 名中學生及教師參與。研討會內容涵蓋 HKMA 的工作簡介、香港紙幣、快速支付系統（FPS）、儲值設施（SVFs）、金融科技及存款保障計劃等主題。自 1998 年該計劃啟動以來，已有逾 60,000 名教師及學生參與。

terms: {'hkma': '金管局', 'internet banking': '網上銀行', 'personal digital key': '個人數碼鎖匙'}
src_raw: The focus of the HKMA’s consumer education initiatives during the year was on educating the public to protect their “personal digital keys”, a concept introduced to help the public visualise the significance of safeguarding information for accessing their online accounts. The central message was that in the digital world, account login details and personal information related to internet banking and other digital financial services were as important as the keys to their home, and should be well protected. Extensive promotion was arranged across different media, including the TV, radio, mobile applications, social media, and other digital and out-of-home platforms, to highlight smart tips on how to protect personal digital keys.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局本年度消費者教育的重點，在於提升公眾對保護「個人數碼密匙」的意識。此概念旨在幫助公眾認識到，保障登入網上帳戶的資訊至關重要。核心訊息是，在數碼世界中，網上銀行及其他數碼金融服務的帳戶登入資料和個人資訊，猶如家門鑰匙般重要，務必妥善保管。為此，管理局透過電視、電台、手機應用程式、社交媒體以及其他數碼及戶外平台，廣泛宣傳保護個人數碼密匙的實用方法。

# Banking and Financial Stability
- Develop and implement a supervisory regime for virtual banks and cope with the increasingly complex prudential supervision standards
- Enhance supervisory capacity for the new regulatory regime for insurance intermediaries
- Step up ongoing monitoring of banks’ culture reform, and conduct ongoing supervision of banks and other relevant entities providing trust services
mt_raw:
# 銀行業與金融穩定
- 制定並實施虛擬銀行監管制度，以應對日益複雜的審慎監管標準。

src_raw: The Financial Secretary (FS) determines the pay and conditions of service for HKMA staff on the advice of the Governance Sub-Committee (GSC) through the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee (EFAC), taking into account the prevailing market rates and practices. mt_raw: 財政司司長（FS）根據外匯基金諮詢委員會（EFAC）轄下的管治小組（GSC）的建議，並參考現行市場薪酬水平及慣例，決定香港金融管理局（HKMA）員工的薪酬及服務條件。薪酬包括總現金薪酬及公積金計劃，實物福利極少。現金薪酬包括每月固定薪金（或基本薪金）以及根據個人表現，每年以一次性形式發放的變動薪金。

src_raw: Climate change is one of the major risks threatening the well-being of mankind and the sustainability of the world economy. The financial sector in which banks operate, being an integral part of the society, will also be impacted and hence should be more proactive in managing climate risks. Against this background, the HKMA unveiled in May a number of measures for promoting the development of green finance in Hong Kong, including the adoption of a three-phased approach to promote green and sustainable banking.

mt_raw: 香港金融管理局的指導原則是，當長期風險調整後回報與其他投資相若時，通常會優先考慮環境、社會及管治（ESG）投資。在適當情況下，金管局於其投資過程中會採用以下責任投資原則，以體現其作為負責任長期投資者的信念。

terms: {'esg factor': 'ESG因素', 'hkma': '金管局', 'manager': '經理', 'bond investment': '債券', 'external manager': '外聘投資經理', 'general partner': '專責合夥人', 'investment analysis process': '投資分析程序', 'private market investment': '私募市場投資', 'public market investment': '公開市場投資', 'esg': '環境、社會及管治'}
src_raw: The HKMA incorporates ESG factors into its investment analysis processes to identify risks and opportunities, as it believes that these factors can materially affect the long-term value of its investments. Specifically, the HKMA has been integrating ESG factors into its investment process for both public and private market investments. For public market investments, the HKMA incorporates ESG factors in its credit risk analysis of bond investment. External managers that share the HKMA’s RI beliefs are selected and appointed. The HKMA communicates its RI beliefs to all its external managers and expects them to align in such a way that the overall sustainable long-term economic performance target is attainable. For private market investments, the ESG policies and practices of the HKMA’s general partners are examined as part of its due diligence process.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局將環境、社會及治理（ESG）因素納入其投資分析流程，以鑒別風險與機會，因其認為這些因素可能對其投資的長期價值產生重大影響。具體而言，香港金融管理局已將ESG因素納入其對公開市場及私營市場投資的投資流程。針對公開市場投資，香港金融管理局在債券投資的信貸風險分析中納入ESG因素，並選聘與其ESG理念一致的外部管理人。香港金融管理局會向所有外部管理人傳達其ESG理念，並期望他們能夠協調一致，以實現整體可持續的長期經濟表現目標。針對私營市場投資，香港金融管理局會在其盡職調查過程中審查其普通合伙人的ESG政策與實踐。

src_raw: The HKMA promotes financial literacy through various channels. Apart from running educational programmes to promote smart and responsible use of banking and financial services by the public, the HKMA features on its revamped official website a new dedicated section on “Smart Consumers”, where the public can find useful information and smart tips on a wide range of banking and related products and services. Social media platforms such as Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram and Twitter are used in addition to the HKMA official website and publications to provide up-to-date information on banking and financial affairs.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局透過多種渠道推廣金融知識。除了舉辦教育項目，鼓勵公眾明智且負責任地使用銀行及金融服務外，金管局亦在其全新改版的官方網站上設有「精明消費者」專區，公眾可以在此找到關於銀行及相關產品和服務的大量實用資訊及貼士。此外，金管局還利用Facebook、LinkedIn、YouTube、Instagram及Twitter等社交媒體平台，配合其官方網站及刊物，提供最新的銀行及金融資訊。

src_raw: The HKMA Information Centre, serving as the HKMA’s major public education and research resource since 2003, introduces the work of the HKMA to the community and promotes public awareness of monetary and banking matters. Educational guided tours are offered daily for group visitors from schools and non-profit making organisations. public education seminars and other activities are also organised for students to enhance their financial knowledge and literacy. In addition, the HKMA works closely with the Investor and Financial Education Council to promote financial literacy in Hong Kong via its financial education platform, The Chin Family.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局資訊中心自2003年起擔任香港金融管理局的主要公眾教育及研究資源，向社會各界介紹香港金融管理局的工作，並提高公眾對貨幣及銀行事務的認識。中心每日為來自學校及非牟利機構的團體提供教育導覽。此外，中心亦會舉辦公眾教育講座及其他活動，以增強學生的財務知識和素養。與此同時，香港金融管理局與投資者及財務教育委員會緊密合作，透過其財務教育平台「The Chin Family」推動香港的財務素養。

terms: {'apple app store': 'Apple App Store', 'braille': '點字', 'google play store': 'Google Play Store', 'hkma': '金管局', 'hong kong society for the blind': '香港盲人輔導會', 'note - issue bank': '發鈔銀行', 'note - measure template': '量鈔器'}
src_raw: To help the visually impaired differentiate between the denomination of the banknotes, a mobile app, sponsored by the HKMA and developed by the Hong Kong Society for the Blind, uses the phone’s camera to scan the banknote patterns for the denomination. The app is available for download from Apple App Store and Google play Store for free. A note-measuring template sponsored by the HKMA and the three note-issuing banks has also been introduced to measure the length of the note. It can measure both the 2018 Series and the notes currently in circulation. The template is embossed with Braille on one side and symbols on the other. It is freely distributed at voluntary agencies serving the visually impaired community.
mt_raw: 為協助視障人士識別紙幣面額，一款由香港金融管理局贊助、香港盲人輔導會開發的手機應用程式，利用手機鏡頭掃描紙幣圖案以辨識面額。此應用程式可於Apple App Store及Google Play Store免費下載。此外，香港金融管理局與三家發鈔銀行共同贊助推出了一款紙幣測量模板，用於測量紙幣長度，適用於2018年系列及現行流通的紙幣。此模板一側印有盲文，另一側則印有符號，並在服務視障人士的慈善機構免費派發。

src_raw: The HKMA is an equal opportunities employer. It believes that everyone should be able to work in an environment free of discrimination, harassment, vilification and victimisation. The equal opportunities policy applies to job advertisements, recruitment, terms and conditions of employment, performance assessment, promotion, transfer, training, dismissal, grievance procedures and general conduct.
mt_raw: 香港金管局是平等機會僱主。我們相信每人均應能在沒有歧視、騷擾、誹謗及報復的環境中工作。平等機會政策適用於招聘廣告、招聘、僱傭條款及條件、績效評估、晉升、調任、培訓、解僱、投訴程序及一般行為。

terms: {'hkma': '金管局'}
src_raw: To cater for projected operational needs, the HKMA renovated the offices during the year to create an open layout, increase capacity and allow for more efficient use of space. Breakout areas and ergonomic furniture are part of the new office design. To enhance the staff’s physical health, height-adjustable desks were offered to staff members, allowing them to change their postures easily throughout the day between sitting and standing.
mt_raw: 為配合未來營運需求，金管局於年內翻新辦公室，採用開放式設計，增加辦公空間，並提升空間使用效率。新的辦公室設計包括了討論區和符合人體工學的家具。為提升員工的身體健康，金管局向員工提供可調節高度的書桌，讓他們可以隨時在坐姿和站姿之間輕鬆切換。
alg_terms: {'hkma': '金管局'}
norm_tgt_terms: ['金管局']

terms: {'annual on - site medical check - up': '體格檢查', 'hkma': '金管局', 'workplace': '工作環境'}
src_raw: The HKMA promotes work-life balance and cares about the health and work safety of the staff. Regular talks on healthy lifestyles, stress management and workplace safety are organised and indoor air quality is monitored. Annual on-site medical check-ups and flu vaccinations are arranged. The HKMA also sponsors a professional counselling service comprising experienced psychologists and social workers.
mt_raw: 香港醫務管理學會致力推動工作生活平衡，並關心員工的健康與工作安全。學會定期舉辦健康生活、壓力管理及工作場所安全講座，並監測室內空氣質素。此外，學會每年安排員工進行體檢及接種流感疫苗。香港醫務管理學會亦贊助專業輔導服務，由經驗豐富的心理學家及社工組成。

src_raw: My objectives are to obtain reasonable assurance about whether the financial statements as a whole are free from material misstatement, whether due to fraud or error, and to issue an auditor’s report that includes my opinion. Reasonable assurance is a high level of assurance, but is not a guarantee that an audit conducted in accordance with the Audit Commission auditing standards will always detect a material misstatement when it exists. Misstatements can arise from fraud or error and are considered material if, individually or in the aggregate, they could reasonably be expected to influence the economic decisions of users taken on the basis of these financial statements.
